name: Sea Salt & Bal Vinegar Potato Chips
description: RED ROCK DELI POTATO CHIPS:SALT & BAL VINEGAR:.:165 GRAM
long_description:
Premium Ingredients that Belong on a Platter
Our potato chips are proudly Australian-made, using the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms. Red Rock Deli Sea Salt & Balsamic Vinegar Potato Chips are roughly cut and slow cooked in 100% sunflower oil to create that satisfying crunch we are so proud of. Our fascination for flavour begins with using delicious ingredients, inspired by recipes prepared by passionate foodies.

Spice Up Your Next Dinner at Home With Friends
Red Rock Deli Sea Salt & Balsamic Vinegar Potato Chips is the perfect option for your next dinner at home with friends, especially when placed in honour on your cheese platter. Indulge in our deliciously bold flavours of sea salt and tangy aged balsamic vinegar alongside your friends, and enjoy the memories you make together.

Potato Chips Like You've Never Tasted
With our truly unique combination of flavours, make Red Rock Deli your go-to natural potato chips. With our chips being gluten-free, made with natural colours, and no added MSG, you can enjoy every bag you get your hands on without second thought. Feed your curiosity by adding Red Rock Deli to your next grocery list.
  • An Australian-made potato chip that is a must-have at your next dinner at home with your friends.

  • Wholesome chips containing natural colours with no added MSG and is gluten-free.

  • Uniquely cut, very crispy and delicious potato chips for your next cheese platter.

  • Perfect for entertaining events, whether that's the next party, gathering or any occasion where you need to impress.

  • Premium ingredients for a premium snacking experience.
ingredients: Potatoes, Canola Oil Natural Flavours, Sugar Salt, Maltodextrin, Food Acid (Citric Acid), Yeast Extract, Onion Powder, Natural Colour, (Paprika Extract), Balsamic Vinegar Powder, Sunflower Oil Antioxidants (Toopherols, Asorbic Acid, Rosemary Extract). Contains Miik, Soy.

name: Veggie Straws Sour Cream & Herb
description: INFUZIONS VEGGIE STRAWS SOUR CREAM & HERB 90G
long_description:
Infuzions Veggie Straws - Our Signature Dish

Discover the delightful blend of potato, spinach, beetroot, and tomato in our Infuzions Veggie Straws. Seasoned to perfection with salt and herbs, these veggie straws are the perfect snack for school, work, or parties, keeping you and your family’s wellbeing on track!

At Infuzions, we believe in creating surprisingly tasty snacktime discoveries. Our light, crunchy, and satisfying snacks are made right here in Australia from wholesome ingredients, infused with mouth-watering herbs and spices.

Why Choose Infuzions Veggie Straws?

  1. 73 Calories Per Cup: A guilt-free snack with only 73 calories per serving.
  2. 30% Less Fat: Contains 30% less fat than regular chips.
  3. No Artificial Colours or Flavours: Enjoy the natural taste of real ingredients.
  4. No Preservatives or Added MSG: A healthier choice for you and your family.
  5. Made in Australia: Proudly supporting local businesses.

Explore the unexpected flavour and texture combinations that make every munching moment exciting and eye-opening. The magic’s in the mix with Infuzions!
ingredients: Vegetable (70%) (Potato, Spinach, Tomato, Beetroot, Onion), Hi-Oleic Sunflower and/or Canola Oil, Maltodextrin (Corn), Glucose, Salt, Sugar, Mineral Salt (Potassium Chloride), Buttermilk Powder (Milk), Whole Milk Powder, Yeast Extract, Parsley, Cheddar Cheese Powder (Milk), Sour Cream Powder (Milk), Natural Flavouring, Food Acid (Citric Acid), Heated Mustard, Antioxidant (Rosemary Extract).

An Australian-made Fan Favourite
Smith's Crinkle Cut Chicken Potato Chips were introduced as Australia's first flavoured chips in 1961 and continue to satisfy Aussie families with the same passion and dedication to taste.
Our Crinkle Cut Chicken Chips are made from no artificial flavours or colours and they're even gluten free, making them perfect tabletop snacks at your party.

Ideal as Lunch Snacks for All Ages
They're not just for occasions though, the 170g share pack is the perfect size to divide up into snack-sized portions to fill up the lunchboxes and work lunch bags. Their delectable, finger-licking seasoning makes them an ideal snack to munch on to relieve your midday cravings.

Potato Snacks Fit For Any Occasion
Smith's Chicken Chips are the perfect lunch snacks to pack for outdoor activities like watching the kids play sport or enjoying a picnic in nature. So grab a bag of Smith's Chips today for a delicious savoury snack to be enjoyed at any occasion.

You know you love 'em.
  • Smith's Crinkle Cut Chicken Chips are Australian made from only the best locally sourced potatoes.

  • Our potato chips are free from any artificial colours and are made with our iconic and succulent chicken seasoning.

  • Gluten free means they're perfect for entertaining guests of all ages.

  • They're the perfect size to divvy up among the family as lunch snacks to take to work or school.

  • Smith's Chicken Chips are the perfect lunch snacks to bring along to outdoor activities or even on road trips.

name: Potato Chips Sour Cream & Onion
description: PRINGLES POTATO CHIPS:SOUR CREAM & ONION:.:134 GRAM
long_description:
Discover the incredible flavour of Pringles Sour Cream & Onion stacked potato chips. Our chips are uniquely shaped and perfectly seasoned!

Experience the irresistible crunch and delicious flavour in every bite!

Great for sharing, it's the ideal savoury snack for a barbecue, picnic or party.

Once you pop, the fun don't stop!
  • Well seasoned to complement that rich potato taste.

  • Delicious blend of sour cream and onion

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Comes in a resealable can

  • A tasty party snack

  • A tempting bite to share with your friends.

  • Great for on-the-go snacking.

name: Crinkle Bbq Potato Chips
description: SMITHS CRINKLE CUT POTATO CHIPS:CRINKLE BBQ:.:170 GRAM
long_description:
An Aussie-Proud Favourite
Since introducing Australia to its first flavoured chip in 1961, Smith's has delivered a range of delicious and unforgettable flavours. Paired with Aussie grown potatoes, barbecue has quickly become a well-known favourite for their tasty seasoning that's provided with every crunch.

Potato Crisps With No Hidden Nasties
Smith's Crinkle Cut Barbecue Potato Chips are made with quality ingredients and no artificial colours or flavours, so you can enjoy them with peace of mind. That's what makes them ideal to pack as lunchbox snacks for your kids when they head back to school, or even just to keep hidden away from prying hands in your desk drawer at work.

Perfect to Share on Road Trips or Gatherings
Crack open a packet while watching the footy finals or when you're on the road with friends. Smith's Crinkle Cut Barbecue Potato Chips are the perfect snack for when you just want to relax and enjoy some delicious chips while with friends. Grab a bag of Smith's Chips today to make the moment you're in more delicious and memorable.

You know you love 'em.
  • Australian made with the finest Aussie potatoes and no artificial flavours or colours.

  • Packed with irresistible crunch and mouth-watering seasoning for the best snacking experience.

  • Gluten free and perfect for school lunch snacks or a quick nibble during your work break.

  • Ideal crowd-pleaser to bring with you on a road trip, or around to your mate's for the next foot finals.

  • Made for festive celebrations with friends and family, whether it's Christmas, Halloween or anything in between.

  • No Artificial Colours.

  • Gluten Free.

  • 100% Australian Potatoes.

name: Grain Waves Chips Sea Salt
description: SUNBITES GRAIN WAVES CHIPS SEA SALT 170GM
long_description:
When you're running on empty, you can't be yourself. So Sunbites is on a mission to fuel Australians with the wholegrain goodness you need to be at your best, every day, so you can put good back into the world.

That's why we've created the Sunbites Good Fuel Fund - devoted to fuelling local heroes and the charities they so tirelessly support.

Together, let's fuel the good in ourselves & our communities!

#Sunbites #Goodfuelfund.


Delicious and good fuel

More than 65% wholegrain
Made with real ingredients
30% less fat than regular potato chips (contains on average, 30% less fat than Smith's Crinkle Cut potato chips)
No added colours or flavours.
  • More than 65% Wholegrain

  • Made with Real Ingredients

  • 30% Less Fat than Regular Potato chips*

  • Natural Colours and Flavours

  • 135 Calories per Serve

name: Grainwaves Wholemeal Chips Caramelised Onion & Bal Vinegar
description: SUNBITES GRAINWAVES WMEAL CHIPS CARAMELISED ONION & BAL VINEGAR 170G
long_description:
Grown and Made Down Under
Crafted with care on Australian soil, Sunbites Grainwaves Caramelised Onion & Balsamic Wholegrain Chips are a true testament to flavour goodness. Made with real ingredients, these Australian-made chips embody Sunbites' commitment to quality and authenticity. Revel in the rich flavours knowing you're supporting local craftsmanship and savouring the taste of embodying Aussie proud in every wholesome, crunchy bite.

Keep the Adventure Going With Wholegrain Chips
Embark on a snacking adventure with Sunbites Grainwaves-the perfect on-the-go companion for those with a busy lifestyle. Packed in a convenient 170g share pack, these chips are ready to accompany you and your friends on your daily adventures. After all, when you're running on empty you can't be yourself! So, elevate your snacking experience with a crunch that keeps up with your daily dynamic pace.

Golden Sun for Your Day
Brighten your work breaks or home moments with Sunbites chips, a burst of golden sun for your day! These wholegrain chips redefine lunchtime snacking, providing a flavourful escape with the caramelised onion and balsamic infusion. Perfectly sized at 170g, they're ideal for a quick, satisfying bite that brings warmth to your breaks. Create a whole new lunchtime routine with a snack that turns ordinary moments into golden memories.
  • We can fuel the good in ourselves with the golden sun energy of Sunbites chips.

  • Lunchbox snacks have never been so easy to choose from when you have the option of caramelised onion and balsamic to taste.

  • Sunbites Grainwaves Caramelised Onion & Balsamic Wholegrain Chips are Australian-made and Aussie proud!

  • Sunbites Grainwaves are suitable for vegetarians and beloved by all.

  • Health Star Rating of 3.5

name: Burger Snacks Party Size Bag
description: BURGER RINGS 220G
long_description:
Maximum Flavour and Maximum Enjoyment for All Your Guests
Burger Rings are made using a delicious blend of tomato, cheese and barbeque flavours so that your burger cravings can be satisfied in one crunchy ring-shaped bite. These rice and corn based snacks may be teeming with mouthwatering burger taste, but don't worry they're suitable for vegetarians too!

Share Packs Designed to Keep Your Guests Reaching for More
Pop these burger-flavoured tangy puffs into a bowl and watch as they get devoured at your next party or gathering with friends. The unique burger flavour and party bag sized share pack make them perfect for sharing around during footy finals season, or to hand out to the whole family during your favourite outdoor activities.

Easy Lunchbox Fillers for Every Family Member
Burger Rings share packs make it easy to keep one tucked away in the pantry so you can divide them up for your family's lunches. They're the perfect flavourful snacking choices for your lunch boxes, or even as a work break snack. The only thing you'll need to worry about is how long they'll last in the pantry!
  • Burger Rings Burger Flavoured Snack Party Size Share Packs are the ideal size and taste to fill the bowl and your next party.

  • Filled to the brim with tangy tomato, savoury cheese and mouthwatering barbeque flavour for that big burger taste.

  • These snacks are suitable for vegetarians and made for all to enjoy.

  • Tangy puffs that are ideal for sharing around during the footy finals, or even as party snacks during your family's favourite outdoor activity.

  • Perfect size to divide up for lunch boxes and work lunch bags.

name: Crinkle Cut Potato Chips Party Bag Original
description: SMITHS CRINKLE CHIPS ORIGINAL 380G
long_description:
The Ultimate Size For Parties And Gatherings
Smith's Original Chips are now available in a generous 380g party bag that's ideal for your next big gathering or when you need to feed a crowd. A perfect addition to the trick-or-treat baskets on Halloween or the party snacks at a family gathering during the Christmas Holidays. So why settle for anything less? Stock up on Smith's Original Chips today and make your next party a delicious success!

Smith's Originals: Always Entertainment-Ready
When it's time to kick back and relax on the couch with family and friends, there's no better snacking companion than a generous bag of Smith's Original Chips. Whether you're snacking away while enjoying movie night or passing it around the room during Footy Finals Season, Smith's crinkle cut chips are the perfect marriage of crunch and flavour to satisfy everyone's cravings. Simply grab a bag of Smith's chips to complement your next entertainment night!

Proudly Australian, Proudly Smith's
Since 1931, Smith's Original Potato Chips have been a beloved Australian pantry staple. Our Original Crinkle Cut Potato Chips are still made with the same passion and dedication to quality taste since our humble beginnings. That's why Smith's original chips are a true testament and commitment to being a proudly Aussie-made snack.
  • A nostalgic crinkle cut snack that delivers the classic crunch and delicious taste of Smith's seasoning with every bite.

  • Our signature original seasoning is packed into every fold of this flavoursome crinkle cut chip.

  • A generously sized party bag that's always entertainment-ready to enhance your movie nights or the footy finals

  • An all-time Aussie favourite made only with Australian potatoes.

  • Our potato chips are free from any artificial colours, meaning they're an ideal snack for everyone to enjoy.

name: Potato Chips Sweet Chilli And Sour Cream
description: RED ROCK DELI POTATO CHIPS SWEET CHILLI & SOUR CREAM
long_description:
Natural Aussie Ingredients
Our potato chips are proudly Australian-made, beginning with the finest potatoes harvested from Australian farms. Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream Chips are roughly cut and slowly cooked in 100% sunflower oil for the most delectable crunch. Seasoned to supreme with the subtle spicy warmth of chilli and the coolness of sour cream, you'll be proud to be an Aussie when you enjoy a pack of Red Rock Deli Chips.

Deli-Style Chips Made for Entertaining
Spice up your next dinner party or picnic feast with Red Rock Deli Sweet Chilli and Sour Cream chips. Savour the flavour of sweet chilli and sour cream as you catch-up with friends and family. Add them as a side to your favourite cheese selection for platter-worthy perfection, or serve them on their own for a dinner at home with friends. They are a better-for-you potato chips option that are sure to leave an impression.

Goodness Contained in Every Chip
Red Rock Deli ensures there's no hidden nasties in their potato snacks by making them with all-natural colours and flavours. Our chips are even gluten-free, so everyone can enjoy crackers like you never tasted. With the addition of our Sweet Chilli & Sour Cream flavouring, it's clear that there is nothing but goodness in our potato chips.
  • Made in Australia, from the fields to your family.

  • Gluten-free means they're perfect for anyone and everyone.

  • Free from any artificial flavours and colours, keeping only natural goodness in our packs.

  • Carefully selected flavour combinations ensure a perfect marriage of that sweet chilli and sour cream taste of potato wedges.

  • Foodie-approved and perfect for entertaining, picnics or any occasion.
ingredients: Potatoes (68%), Canola Oil, Sugar, Salt, Yeast Extract, Buttermilk Powder (Milk), Maltodextrin, Dextrin, Onion Powder, Corn Starch, Spices (Chilli, Paprika, Black Pepper), Sour Cream Powder (Milk), Natural Flavour, Food Acids Acid), Garlic Powder, Natural Colours (Cochineal, Caramel, Paprika Extract); Sunflower Oil, Antioxidants (Tocopheroisascorbic Acid, Rosemary Extract). Contain Milk, Soy.

name: Cheese Party Size Bag Sharepack
description: TWISTIES CHEESE PARTY BAG SHAREPACK 270 GRAM
long_description:
Perfectly-sized Party Snacks
The captivating crunch and its irresistibly cheesy flavour will leave you craving the crunch long after they're gone, wishing you had more. That's why we've upsized them into a party-sized share pack so that you and your friends don't have to twist your hands getting into the packet. They're the perfect portion sizes to fill up your next party bowl or pass around during Footy Finals. Twisties are sure to bring a unique twist of enjoyment to your next event or gathering.

Lunch Snacks For All Ages
Our Twisties Cheese Party Size Share Packs are the perfect size to leave in the pantry and divide up among your family for their daily dose of lunchtime fun. They provide the maximum crunch and an irresistibly cheesy flavour that's sure to satisfy. Perfect as a work break snack to take into the office or as a lunchbox snack that kids will adore when it's time to go back to school.

Even Better with Friends!
There's a good reason why Twisties are a national snack icon that has had a special place in the hearts and mouths of Australians for more than 50 years. They're the ideal taste to pair with good times. Whether it's helping fuel the fun at your next backyard barbie with friends or they're being passed around the backseat during your next road trip, these iconic corn snacks are sure to get everyone stuck into the pack.

Aussie Snacks that Satisfy Anytime, Anywhere.
They're perfect anytime during the day, for morning tea or a late-night snack because let's face it, life's pretty straight without Twisties!
They can't get better, can they? Well here's the twist - We're proud to say that Twisties are Australian-made from only the finest ingredients.
  • Our Twisties are Australian-made from only the finest ingredients that have been selected for maximum crunch.

  • An extra size up means there's enough for all of your friends and family.

  • Twisties Party Bags are the perfect size to keep large crowds entertained at gatherings or just to divide up into lunchboxes.

  • Perfectly suitable as morning tea, lunch snacks or an after-dinner indulgence.

  • They're the ideal taste to pair with good times, whether that's at the footy finals with your mates or to pass around the backseat during a road trip.

description: INFUZIONS PRAWN CRACKERS BBQ 90G
long_description:
Infuzions Prawn Crackers - Delightfully Delicious and Crunchy


Experience the irresistible sweet and tangy barbecue flavour of our Infuzions Prawn Crackers. These delightfully delicious and crunchy snacks are perfect for school, work, or parties, keeping you and your family's wellbeing on track!


At Infuzions, we believe in creating surprisingly tasty snacktime discoveries. Our light, crunchy, and satisfying snacks are made right here in Australia from wholesome ingredients, infused with mouth-watering herbs and spices.


Why Choose Infuzions Prawn Crackers?

  1. 57 Calories Per Serve: A guilt-free snack with only 57 calories per serving.
  2. 30% Less Fat: Contains 30% less fat than regular chips in palm oil.
  3. Vegan Friendly: Suitable for those following a plant-based lifestyle.
  4. No Artificial Colours or Flavours: Enjoy the natural taste of real ingredients.
  5. No Preservatives or Added MSG: A healthier choice for you and your family.
  6. Made in Australia: Proudly supporting local businesses.


Embrace adventure and explore the unexpected flavor and texture combinations that make every munching moment exciting and eye-opening. The magic's in the mix with Infuzions!

name: Double Crunch Potato Chips Share Pack Original
description: SMITHS DOUBLE CRUNCH ORIGINAL 150G
long_description:
Everyone Loves A Good Crunch Fest!
Satisfy your cravings and feed the crowd with Smith's Double Crunch Original Potato Chips. Our Original flavour retains the classic savoury taste, now delivered with a double crunch sensation. It is an absolute crowd-pleaser that guests of all ages will be able to enjoy. Better yet, our generous share pack is the go-to snack to pass around at your next party. Whether it's a gathering or a Christmas Party, let your guest indulge in the best crunch sensation! Grab a pack of Smith's today and start snacking on extra crunchy chips!

Lunchtime Just Became More Satisfying
Make lunch snacks more delightful with Smith's Double Crunch Original thick-cut chips. With our share pack, you can easily divide it up into delicious portions and tuck them away in lunchboxes for a delightful lunch snack surprise. Every bite delivers double the crunch* and a satisfying hit of savoury goodness.

The Taste Of Australia In Every Crunch
Indulge in the taste of Australia with every bite of Smith's Double Crunch Original Potato Chips. We pride ourselves in our commitment to the Aussie way, making each and every chip with top-quality Australian potatoes. This makes Smith's Chips the perfect potato snack for any occasion. So grab some Smith's and experience the ultimate snacking sensations today, the Aussie way.

* 2 x crunch than Smith's Crinkle Cut potato chips.
  • * 2 x crunch than Smith's Crinkle Cut potato chips.

  • Made gluten-free for anyone to enjoy at anytime

  • Double the fun with Smith's chips, everyone loves a good crunch fest!

  • Perfect to divvy up into delicious portions for lunchboxes

  • No Artificial Flavours

  • No Artificial Colours.

name: Puff Snacks Share Pack Tangy
description: TOOBS PARTY BAG 150G
long_description:
Tasty Tangy Snacks For All To Enjoy!
Tasty Toobs are meticulously crafted into tube-shaped delights. The tangy wheat-based snacks are seasoned generously to deliver a fun and saucy bite-sized treat. On top of being a delicious snack, Tasty Toobs are also suitable for vegetarians to enjoy!

Bring The Fun To Any Occasion
Tasty Toobs are here for one purpose; to deliver the ultimate crowd-pleasing snack, no matter the occasion! Our party-sized Toobs are the perfect addition to a fun-filled evening. Whether you're hosting a wild party or a chilled gathering, these hollow-shaped bites are sure to leave everyone satisfied and full of joy!
What's more, you can even leave a bag of Toobs on the coffee table to ease tensions on Footy Finals night.

All-Time Favourite, Aussie-Made Snack Sensation
Back by popular demand, Tasty Toobs Tangy Snacks are made in Australia for the country to relive a nostalgic snack sensation. Our commitment to delivering an iconic Aussie snack that's filled with a fun and saucy bite remains unchanged since our inception in 1954.
  • Tasty Toobs, the nostalgic Aussie snack icon, returns with a bang!

  • Seasoned generously with tangy-flavoured goodness for a fun-filled and saucy bite-sized snack.

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

  • Australian-made Aussie snack icon.

  • Party-sized share pack makes sharing more convenient and fun.

long_description:
Baked Light Crispy Texture

As part of the Smith's Baked range, these chips are double-baked rather than fried for a consistent light crispness. Big on flavour with 50% less fat than Smith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips, they offer the familiar Smith's taste in a deliciously light snack.

Aussie Tradition And Pride

Proudly Australian-made, this range reflects Smith's long-standing place in homes across the country. Each bag continues the legacy of a brand that's been known for simple and delicious snacking for over 90 years.

Sharing Moments Made Easy

This share pack is suited to relaxed outdoor picnics, casual BBQ tables or easy at-home entertaining. It's designed to make group snacking simple. Just pass these delicious oven-baked potato chips around and watch them disappear!
  • Margherita-inspired flavour with tomato, herbs and chilli.

  • Baked, not fried, with 50% less fat thanSmith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips.

  • Great for sharing at picnics, BBQs or relaxed gatherings.

  • Australian made.

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

name: Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Salt & Vinegar
description: SMITHS THINLY CUT POTATO CHIPS:SALT & VINEGAR:.:175 GRAM
long_description:
Bring Along Adventure
Ready to make the most of the day? Heading out on a road trip along the Australian coast? Or maybe you're scheduling a day full of outdoor activities with friends? No matter the occasion, heighten the sense of adventure by bringing along a share pack of Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Salt & Vinegar 175g. There's more than enough to go around, and these light potato chips are sure to provide the perfect start for a full day of fun.

Elevate Your Lunch Game
Lunchtime is always a highly anticipated moment in the day, whether you're relaxing on the weekend or in the middle of a hectic day of work. Turn up the excitement by packing some thinly cut potato chips to enjoy for the moment you're in. These lunch snacks elevate the pleasure and taste of any meal of your choice. You can also let the sharp flavours of salt and vinegar chips stand on their own as a post-lunch snack.

Pulled Straight From Australian Soil
Smith's chips are proud to be made from potatoes grown and harvested right here in Australia's rich soil. Each potato is carefully chosen before being sliced thinly into the gluten-free, crunchy crisps we all know and love. Each perfectly cooked potato chip is carefully sprinkled with a balanced blend of salt and vinegar, eventually ending up right in your pantry for you to enjoy. With no artificial flavours, colours, or preservatives included in the process, you can trust in the innate goodness of these gluten-free potato chips.
  • Salt and vinegar chips are a staple of the Australian snack industry, but no one does it quite like Smith's chips.

  • Smith's Thinly Cut Potato Chips Share Pack Salt & Vinegar 175g is more than big enough to share the delightful light but satisfying crunch of thinly cut potato chips with your mates.

  • Whether your planning a picnic, a trip into the great outdoors, or having pals over for the big game, this share pack is big enough for everyone to enjoy and bound to add flavour to the occasion.

  • Smith's potato chips are made in Australia with only the finest home-grown potatoes.

  • Free from gluten and with no artifical flavours, everybody can savour the flavour of this tasty chip.

name: Crinkle Cut Original Potato Chips
description: SMITHS CRINKLE CUT POTATO CHIPS:CRINKLE ORIGINAL:.:170 GRAM
long_description:
Australian-made and Aussie Proud
Our Smith's Chips are made from 100% Australian potatoes grown by local farms - including a family-run farm that's been supplying us for over 50 years. In 1931, Smith's took the humble potato and created the original crinkle-cut potato chip recipe we all know and love today. Affectionately known as 'the People's Chip', our national heritage is something we are very proud to celebrate.

Potato Snacks to Accompany Your Outdoor Activities
There is no better snack when watching the footy grand final or sprawling across the green for a picnic than Smith's Original Crinkle Cute Chips. They're perfect for indulging after a hard day's work along with a crisp cold drink and a moment in the glorious Australian sun.

An Unbelievably Good but Gluten-Free Snack
Smith's Original Crinkle Cut Chips are free from any hidden nasties! No artificial flavours, colours, or even gluten means that anyone can enjoy the classic crunch and unbeatable original flavour that only a Smith's potato chip can bring! Don't hesitate to pop open a pack next time you and your mate's meet up.
  • They're the nostalgic Aussie flavour that's made from local ingredients right on your doorstep.

  • No artificial flavours or colours mean that they're perfect as wholesome lunchbox options for your kids.

  • As a gluten-free snack, anyone can enjoy the classic crinkle cut crunch and Smith's Original flavour.

  • There is no better snack when watching the footy grand final or sprawling across the green for a picnic.

  • They're the ideal snack to come home to after a long day's work

Entertaining Made Easy with Bold Flavours
When it comes to entertaining, Red Rock Deli Potato Chips Share Pack Thai Chilli & Lime 165g stand out. The zesty, spicy flavour is sure to excite guests at your next party or casual gathering. name: Potato Chips Sea Salt
description: RED ROCK DELI POTATO CHIPS:SEA SALT:.:165 GRAM
long_description:
Only Natural Ingredients, No Hidden Nasties
Made in Australia with all natural ingredients and no added flavours or colours, Red Rock Deli Sea Salt chips are roughly cut and slowly cooked in 100% sunflower oil for that satisfying crunch. Keeping things all natural ensures there are no hidden nasties to surprise you, making them scrumptious crisps like you never tasted before.

Platter-Worthy Perfection Made for Entertaining
Red Rock Deli Sea Salt Chips are a classic potato chip flavour that will go with anything; from the salty deli meats to the creamiest of cheeses on your next cheese platter. Our chips are perfect for an elevated dinner party or a casual dinner at home with friends watching the latest TV series. No matter what kind of atmosphere you're trying to set up, Red Rock Deli is ready to support!

Draw Out Your Hidden Creativity
Get creative at your next picnic with our Red Rock Deli Sea Salt chips by dipping them in our Red Rock Deli dips. Or, for inspired passionate foodies, sprinkle crushed sea salt chips into your latest recipe for a delectable added crunch. Mac and Cheese? Savoury salad? Nachos with a twist? Red Rock Deli is here to make things deliciously wild!
  • Subtle flavours, massive crunch!

  • Platter worthy perfection when you're trying to entertain your guests.

  • Gluten-free and no MSG means they're a tasty potato chips option.

  • Cut precisely and slowly cooked for a satisfying crunch, seasoned with a subtle grinding of fresh Australian sea salt.

  • Perfect for a dinner party, picnic, or work break snack.

Cheetos Cheese & Bacon Balls come in a generous 190g share pack that makes them the ideal party snacks for Halloween or the Christmas Holidays. These Australian-made cheese snacks are sure to be a nostalgic hit on your next road trip or outdoor activity with friends.

Lunch Snacks For All Ages
Our Cheetos Party-size share packs are the perfect size to leave in the pantry and divide up for your family's lunch boxes. With little bursts of cheesy goodness and an unrivalled crunch, these puffs are sure to be a hit as a lunch snack, or even with the adults as a cheeky work break snack.

Entertainment and Savoury Satisfaction
Cheetos Cheese & Bacon Balls are the snack companion you never thought you needed whether you're chowing down on the couch at home putting your skills to the test, on your favourite online game, or even mastering your skills at the local skate park.
  • Cheetos Cheese & Bacon Balls are the perfect bite-sized savoury treat for anyone looking for a new snacking experience.

  • Our cheese puffs are made in Australia from real cheese and no artificial colours.

  • This party bag of cheese snacks is sure to be a nostalgic hit at any party or gathering.

  • Loved by all, they're the family-favourite snack for work breaks and lunch boxes.

  • The ideal snack companion for all your entertainment needs.

  • Made With Real Cheese.

description: SMITH'S BAKED SNACKS:SALT:.:130GRAM
long_description:
Baked Light Crispy Texture

Oven-baked, not fried, these chips offer a lighter crunch. They're big on flavour, with 50% less fat than Smith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips. The simple sea salt seasoning lets the baked texture stand out, offering a light and crisp snack.

Aussie Tradition And Pride

Proudly Australian-made, this Baked range is another reason why Smith's is an everyday pantry favourite. The Smith's brand has spent decades providing high-quality snacks that bring friends and families together.

A Bag Big Enough to Share

Perfect for picnics, backyard BBQs or relaxed entertaining, this share pack fits naturally into group settings. Its simple sea salt flavour makes it a versatile potato chip that works with a variety of snacks and dips.
  • A light and satisfying sea salt flavour.

  • Baked, not fried, with 50% less fat thanSmith's Crinkle Cut Potato Chips.

  • Great for sharing at BBQs, picnics, footy nights, or casual get-togethers.

  • Australian made.

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

Gourmet Chips That Belong On A Platter
Red Rock Deli Lime & Black Pepper Potato Chips are the ultimate gourmet chips to include in your next cheese platter. These zesty, spicy bites will have the foodies raving. Elevate your next spread today.

Entertainment-Ready Chips, Made To Impress
When it's time to impress your guests at your next dinner party, Red Rock Deli Potato Chips are up for the challenge! A gourmet treat for any occasion, our chips are equally coveted at picnic gatherings with friends. Made in convenient 165g share packs ensures there is plenty to go around.

Exceptional Quality & Taste, The Australian Way
Red Rock Deli Potato Chips are the perfect embodiment of exceptional quality and taste. Made using the best Aussie-grown potatoes, our dedication ensures that every bite delights.
  • Seasoned with the zing of fresh lime and the subtle heat of freshly ground pepper, designed to spark the interest of your inner foodie.

  • Hand-cooked for the perfect golden crispness and a delicately seasoned flavour.

  • Crowd favourite potato chips that are perfect for entertaining, picnics or any snacking occasion.

  • Finest quality and taste made only in Australia, perfect for offering up on your next cheese platter.

  • A gluten-free share pack for anyone and everyone to indulge in.

The Premium Potato Chip That Works Hard For You
Made with real potatoes and bold flavours, Red Rock Deli Potato Chips Share Pack Chilli Sriracha 165g is the go-to snack for those looking to share. Pop open a share pack and season any atmosphere with the spicy delight of chilli sriracha.

Add Crunch To Your Cheeseboard
In charge of the tablescape at the next gathering? Don't know how to fill the platter space between the cheese and the fruit? The Red Rock Deli Chilli Sriracha Share Pack is perfect for spicing up those spaces and making your platter feel a little fuller. Not to mention, each chip packs a flavourful punch that'll have your friends continuing to put you in charge of the cheese board.

Avoid Foodie Fights
We all know the awkward silence when two people reach for the last chip. Red Rock Deli's Sharepack of Chilli Sriracha prevents things from getting out of hand, with enough to satisfy everyone. Bring them out during dinner parties or to munch on as the mains are being prepared.
  • Red Rock Deli's Chilli Sriracha Sharepack has enough for everybody, so no-one gets hurt in a food fight.

So Sunbites, The Good Fuel Co., is on a mission to fuel Australians with the wholegrain goodness you need to be at your best, every day, so you can put good back into the world. name: Minis Cheese & Bacon Flavoured Snacks
description: CHEETOS MINIS CHEESE SNACKS SHARE CANISTER CHEESE & BACON 90G
long_description:
Unmistakably Cheetos

Known for bold, cheesy flavour and playful snacking, Cheetos now brings that fun-loving spirit to Minis. This resealable canister makes it easy to dip in and out, keeping every bite as deliciously crunchy as the first.

Snack with Personality

Cheetos Minis tap into a worldwide love for bold, cheesy flavour. They're the go-to for anyone who wants to be part of the fun and enjoy a snack that always delivers on taste and crunch.

Just Pop & Share

Whether it's a weekend hangout, a mid-arvo break, or a marathon gaming session, the canister format keeps the crunch ready whenever the fun kicks off.
  • Cheetos' unmistakable cheese & bacon flavour combo in every mini.

  • A bold, crunchy snack now in bite-sized pieces.

  • A conveniently sized canister that's perfect for relaxed snacking or on-the-go moments.

  • Aussie-made with real cheese.

  • Made from only the highest quality corn.

name: Minis Cheese Supreme Flavoured Corn Chips
description: DORITOS MINIS CORN CHIPS SHARE CANISTER CHEESE SUPREME 120G
long_description:
Turn Up The Flavour

Doritos has always been about turning up the taste to full volume. With Minis, that unmistakable crunch and Cheese Supreme kick now come in a canister designed for easy snacking.

For Lovers of Bold Snacking

Doritos Minis connect with people who live and snack boldly and aren't afraid to show it. They're a full-flavoured corn chip that matches big personalities and even bigger moments.

Pop It, Pass It, Play On

Whether it's a movie night with mates, a gaming marathon, or a summer hangout, Doritos Minis bring bold flavour to every shared moment. Pop the lid, pass the canister around, and watch these cheesy chips disappear.
  • Bold Cheese Supreme seasoning in every crunch.

  • Doritos taste turned up to full volume in a bite-sized corn chip.

  • A resealable canister that ensures every cheesy corn chip stays perfectly fresh and crisp.

  • Proudly Aussie-made with real cheese.

  • Only the highest quality corn goes into each cheesy chip.

name: Corn Chips Mexicana Share Pack
description: DORITOS CORN CHIPS MEXICANA 170G
long_description:
Fuel Your Boldness with Doritos
Doritos isn't just a chip-it's a call to go bigger, bolder, louder. With intense flavour baked into every bite, this Mexicana variant is all about dialling up your snack game. No matter the occasion, Doritos delivers the crunch and taste that turns every moment into an occassion.

Made for Those Who Love to Eat Loud
Doritos Mexicana is the go-to for thrill seekers, spice fans and flavour obsessives. If your snack stash says 'no mild allowed,' this is your chip. Loved by gamers, party starters, and anyone who thinks cheese and chilli is the ultimate combo, Doritos is the crunch with clout.

Share the Spice. Turn up the Heat
Doritos Corn Chips Share Pack Mexicana 170g is made for movie nights, pre-party munchies, or spicing up the weekend BBQ. Whether you're sharing with mates or enjoying a portion solo on the couch, this flavour-packed bag brings the heat and crunch you need to keep the vibe going.
  • Bolder flavour in every bite from the Doritos you know and love.

  • The Mexican flavour pairs perfectly with our selection of dips available in mild, medium and spicy flavours.

  • Our Doritos Mexicana tortilla chips pair perfectly with classic Mexican flavours. Spice up your Mexican nights with extra crunchy quesadillas or nachos.

  • Made in Australia from quality ingredients the whole family with love.

  • Contains no artificial colours or flavours and is gluten free.

name: Corn Chips Nacho Cheese Share Pack
description: DORITOS CORN CHIPS:NACHO CHEESE SHAREPACK 170 GRAM
long_description:
Fuel Your Adventure with Doritos Yellow
A bag of Doritos Nacho Cheese is all you need to fuel your next gathering. They're perfect as party snacks that provide variety and excitement, or as the ideal treat to accompany your late-night gaming experience. Whether you're tackling your newest blockbuster gaming title or munching away while watching your favourite twitch streamer, our nacho chips are here to provide the perfect snacking experience on the side.

Add the Missing Crunch to Your Meal With Our Cheesy Chips
Our tortilla chips are so good that we're convinced you'll take any excuse to enjoy our bold cheese snacks all the time. Why not add them to your next dinner to give your meal that cheesy flair and unmistakable crunch?
All you need is a packet of Doritos Nachos Cheese Corn Chips and be bold enough to take the challenge on.

American-Inspired Snacks with an Australian Heart
Doritos are made in Australia from the best quality ingredients that are sure to send your tastebuds into raptures. Providing you the famous tooth-rattling crunch that we all know and love. So, get ready to embark on a bold and flavourful journey with Doritos Nacho Chips!
  • Doritos are made in Australia from the best quality ingredients to give off that bold Doritos flavour and unbeatable crunch.

  • You can even add them to your next meal to give it that cheesy flair and extra crunch you've been looking for.

  • Our nacho cheese-flavoured tortilla chips are the perfect variety flavour to add to your next Christmas Holiday gathering.

  • They're great as the sharing centrepiece at your next party or to bring along to fuel your next outdoor adventure.

  • A Doritos Nacho Cheese Share Pack is the ideal treat to keep you company during your late-night gaming experience.

name: Cheese Supreme Corn Chips Sharepack
description: DORITOS CHEESE SUPREME CORN CHIPS SHAREPACK 380G
long_description:
Party Snacks Ideal for Entertaining Friends and Family
Doritos is a classic party snack, loved by millions around the world for its iconic intense flavour that's sure to keep your hands locked inside the packet. We know it's hard to keep your hands off those tasty triangles and that's why we've made them available in a party size to make sure there's enough to go around!

Fuel Your Entertainment with Bold Flavour
Our Party Size Doritos Cheese Supreme makes sure that everyone at your next gathering can tuck into some bold cheesy goodness before the pack runs dry. We're there to liven up the party, no matter the occasion. Whether it's keeping your classic rager hunger-free, or working hard as a fuel source for your group gaming sessions or a twitch viewing party, there's always a demand for Doritos.

Versatile Crunch You Can Add to Any Meal
Doritos are so flavourful you can even sneak them into your meals for that extra oomph of flavour you've been missing. Doritos make a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or to give your dinner that extra crunchy crust or coating you've been missing out on. You can even accompany your corn chips with the Doritos Salsa Range for an even tastier munching experience.

Want to Doritos-fy your favourite dishes? Maybe a Doritos-crusted chicken schnitty for that crispy outside crunch or as the perfect tortilla chips for your next beef nachos? Whatever your favourites are, let Doritos inspire your dinner creations.
Licking your lips at the thought? The Doritos Cheese Supreme Party Size is perfect for those who find their cheesy triangles go missing before it's time to start cooking.
  • Doritos are made in Australia only from the finest harvest of Australian corn.

  • Doritos corn chips make a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or to give your dinner that extra crunchy crust or coating.

  • Keep your tastebuds satisfied while gaming with friends or watching late-night twitch streams.

  • A chip that's sure to leave an impression with its tooth-rattling crunch and deliciously cheesy flavouring.

  • Doritos Cheese Supreme Party Size Sharepack ensures there's enough to go around at any party.

name: Lightly Salted Tortilla Chips
description: TOSTITOS:LIGHTLY SALTED:.:175 GRAM
long_description:
The Perfect Tortilla Chips for Toppings and Dips!
Finding the perfect snack bowl filler can be infuriating when your guests are just around the corner. About to crack? Your chips shouldn't! All our irresistibly crunchy corn tortilla chips are built to take on all your favourite dips and toppings when snacking time comes around. Not sure where to start? We've popped our favourite Tostitos recipe on the back of every pack so you can pull out all the stops for a Mexican-style night at home. Whatever pairings you fancy, you can be sure that Tositos will stand the test of your favourite dip or topping.

Centrepiece of the Snack Table, Life of the Dinner Party
Our 175g share pack makes sure there's more than enough to go around for everyone, no matter the occasion. Whether you're filling the bowl for a Christmas Holiday family dinner, or laying out the ideal spread for a dinner party, give your guests their own base to build on. Share the love with our hearty dippers. Add a little variety to your party or lunch snacks and let your guests get to the good stuff!

The Couch Companion that Never Disappoints
If you're looking for the perfect chip and dip combo for your late-night movie marathons, or just want a savoury snack to keep you company during TV time, Tostitos have you covered. Say Hola! to corn chips that can actually hold up to your favourite dips and TV shows. Our crispy, subtly savoury corn tortilla chips never disappoint! Better yet, Tostitos Lightly Salted Tortilla Corn Chips contain no added MSG and no artificial flavours or preservatives.
  • Tostitos Cantina Style Tortilla Corn Chips are the ideal dip and topping holders that actually hold up.

  • Our 175g share pack is the perfect size to add a little variety to your next Christmas Holiday gathering or dinner party.

  • No added MSG, artificial flavours or preservatives.

  • Find a recipe for your next Mexican-style night on the back of your favourite Tostitos.

  • The ideal couch companion to keep you company during your favourite TV shows and movies.

  • Health Star Rating of 3.5..

name: Dip Platter Entertaining Size Hot Salsa
description: DORITOS DIPS SALSA:HOT:.:300 GRAM
long_description:
Dip into Something Different
From the brand that lives for bold, Doritos Mexican-Style Hot Salsa is built for the ultimate chip companion. Designed to pair perfectly with Doritos Tortilla Chips, this entertaining-size jar delivers the punchy, Mexican-inspired flavour fans expect - with the heat dial turned all the way up.

For Heat-lovers and Flavour Fanatics
If you're the kind of snacker who adds hot sauce to everything, this one's for you. Doritos Hot Salsa isn't just another dip - it's a statement. Loved by chilli chasers, spice seekers, and anyone who believes mild is boring, this salsa knows how to bring the fire.

Built for Big Dips and Bigger Nights
Doritos Mexican-Style Dip Entertaining Size Hot Salsa 300g is made for game days, party spreads and those loud, late-night snack sessions. It's a crowd-pleaser with a kick - perfect for sharing (or not) when the snacks need to stand out and the heat needs to be real.
  • Doritos Hot Salsa Dip provides a spicy and explosive flavour that's sure to leave you reaching for more.

  • Perfect to load on top of your Doritos Corn Chips or Crackers when you're craving that punchy in-your-face flavour.

  • Ideal for entertaining, footy nights and party snack tables.

  • Made in Australia from quality ingredients.

  • Free from any artificial colours and flavours.

long_description:
Unlock Your Gaming Potential
Take your gaming sessions to a whole new level with Doritos Corn Chips Multipack of 8 Cheese Supreme 152g. Each bite delivers the perfect balance of creamy cheese and salty corn chips. Clear those levels and power the game with the iconic Doritos corn chip. Whether you're sharing packets around at home or bringing them along to a group gaming night, they're the perfect, portable companion to any session.

The Classically Crunchy Choice
When you want to feel the crunch between your teeth, Doritos Cheese Supreme corn chips are the perfect snacking choice. Portable and easy to eat on the go, Doritos are ready for any occasion-whether it's hanging out with friends, gaming, or indulging in outdoor activities. Like many snack loves, Doritos Cheese Supreme Corn Chips are bold, edgy and exciting. They're the chip for the curious, the courageous and the creative.

The Multipack That'll Make You The Life of Any Party
This Doritos Corn Chips Multipack is a crowd-favourite, no matter the party. Bring a box to the table, set and forget, or divvy up the 8-pack. Either way, they'll be an instant hit.
With pre-portioned servings, these moreish corn chips will stop you from going overboard.

Now available in an 8 pack box - easy to store in your pantry and recycle in your kerbside bin!
  • Bring the party with the ultimate social snack.

Perfect for Entertaining Company
Whether you're looking for that flavoursome fan-favourite to bring along to a gathering or looking to fuel your late-night gaming grind, this triangular gen-z icon never fails to excite.

Chips? Nachos? Anything.
In fact, it's so good that it makes a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or even just to give your dinner that extra crunch factor.

Want to Doritos-fy your favourite dishes?
Maybe a Doritos Mac & Cheese for that oh-so-satisfying crunch or an even cheesier toastie with our mind-boggling seasoning?

The Boldest of Cheese Snacks
Rest assured, Doritos are made in Australia from carefully selected ingredients that provide you with the unmistakably bold flavour we all know and love.
The only thing you need to worry about is whether there'll be enough to go around!

The only love triangle you'll ever want or need.
  • Made in Australia from carefully selected ingredients for that bold Doritos flavour and unmistakable crunch.

  • They make a fantastic addition to your meal as a seasoning or even just to give your dinner that extra crunch factor.

  • Our Share Packs are made for entertaining, whether it's at parties with friends or family gatherings.

name: Mild Salsa Dips
description: DORITOS MILD SALSA DIPS 300 GRAM
long_description:
The Superior Chips and Dip Combo
Just like how Doritos chips are specially designed for optimal scooping and dipping, our Mild Salsa is a Mexican dip experience that's tailor-made for any corn chip. Our salsa sauce combines overtones of bold Mexican flavour with undertones of tangy ripe tomatoes that'll make your tastebuds tango! With the classic sweetness that accompanies this mild flavouring, any one of our Dorito chip flavour range has met its heavenly match.

Better for Sharing
A gathering with friends and family just around the corner? Make your prep work easier, and your corn chip and crackers platter spicier with our famous salsa. Our dip is the perfect size to share and pass around, or to stay stationary as the centrepiece of the snack tray. The conveniently-sized jar is easy to pack when making the trip to your friend's house, or to store at home in preparation for your own next event.

Serve Up with Care
Despite the unbelievably bold and insatiable flavours, our Doritos Mild Salsa contains absolutely no artificial colours or flavours. What's more, our salsa is suitable for vegetarians and is 99% fat-free so you can feel confident offering delicious options to your guests. The Doritos brand is very focused on serving snack choices with care, and our salsa dip is no different! Don't hesitate to use it for your household's Taco Tuesday, or special occasion nachos when you want the love of spice to be shared.
  • Despite our insatiable tangy flavours, our Doritos Mild Salsa is completely free from any artificial colours or flavours.

  • Our salsa is 99% fat-free and even suitable for vegetarians, so you can feel confident offering delicious and better-for-you options while entertaining.

  • The combination of classic Mexican flavour with shades of tangy ripe tomatoes will be sure to make your tastebuds tango.

  • Doritos dip is the perfect size to share and pass around, or fits straight into the centrepiece of a snack tray.

  • In classic Doritos fashion, a scoop of our Salsa serves as the perfect flavour to accompany your weeknight tacos or nachos.
ingredients: Partially Reconstituted Tomato Puree (49%), Chopped Tomatoes (19%), Onion, Peppers (10%), Jalapeno Peppers (2%), Spirit Vinegar, Salt, Modified Corn Starch, Sugar, Garlic Puree, Coriander, Capsicum Extract. Suitable for vegetarians.

name: Corn Chips Share Pack Flaming Hot Cheese Supreme
description: DORITOS FLAMIN HOT CHEESE SUPREME 150g
long_description:
Doritos Flaming Hot Cheese Supreme Corn Chips are the quintessential snack for Generation Z-bold, adventurous, and unapologetically bursting with spices. Reflecting the spirit of a generation that craves excitement and individuality, these nacho chips redefine the snacking experience. With their vibrant taste and iconic crunch, they're not just chips; they're a statement-a bold expression of taste for a generation that dares to be different.

Enhance Your Gaming Experience
Elevate your gaming sessions with the taste of cheese supreme flaming hot flavours-the ultimate for intense gaming activities. Packed with fierce spices and the energy-boosting power of corn, these party snacks keep you in the zone during those marathon gaming sessions. The perfect blend of heat and cheese ensures that every bite is a burst of motivation, propelling you to victory in the virtual realm of video games and beyond.

Perfect Size for Sharing
Make every gathering a flavourful fiesta with Doritos Corn Chips in the convenient 150g share pack-a perfect size for splitting amongst friends. Whether it's movie night, game day, or a casual hangout, these chips ensure that everyone gets a taste of the bold and cheesy goodness. Spice up your social moments with the iconic flavour that brings friends together, making every shared bag a memorable snacking experience.
  • Crunch into the Iconic taste of Doritos Corn Chips, now with the sizzling sensation of flaming hot cheese supreme.

  • Doritos bold flavour makes it the perfect for lunch snacks and party snacks alike, ready to set the mood for any occasion.

  • Gen Z and their fiery personality matches perfectly with these nacho chips and their entertaining eating experience.

  • Gaming, relaxing, or partying with friends has never felt so easy with the convenience of this share pack.

Perfect for Last Minute Party Prep
Doritos is the surefire crowd-pleaser that's perfect to bring along as a party treat. Our Doritos Thai Sweet Chilli 150g share pack is the perfect size for everyone to get pass around, or to fill out that party serving bowl. These drool-inducing corn chips take inspiration from succulent Thai-inspired spices for a snacking experience like no other. The unique but subtle flavours mean that these corn chips will slot straight into your snack lineup for your next get-together.

Maximise your Entertainment with Maximum Bold Flavour
Doritos have always gone hand in hand with your entertainment and this unique flavour is no different. Whether it's a lazy afternoon spent on the couch, an addition to your usual lunch snacks, or a quick indulgence during your gaming sessions, our finger-licking Thai Sweet Chilli flavour is the ideal snack to keep by your side.

Craving that Crunch? Doritos Corn Tortilla Chips Have You Covered
Everybody knows that the classic crunch of Doritos can't be beaten, but that's all the more reason why they make a great addition to your next meal. The sweet and savoury flavour along with the unbeatable Doritos crunch will add unbelievable depth to your next Asian Fusion dish. Smash them up for some added texture in a Thai beef salad, or even as a flavourful base as nacho chips.

name: Splash Of Lime Tortilla Chips
description: TOSTITOS:SPLASH OF LIME:.:175 GRAM
long_description:
The Perfect Base for Toppings and Dips
Tostitos Splash of Lime Tortilla Chips are golden, crispy corn strips that are made to hold all your favourite toppings and dips. Because we know that your tortilla chips should crack when they're in your mouth, not before.
The splash of subtle citrus flavours is irresistible when topped with your favourite fresh ingredients like avocado, corn salsa and chopped tomatoes (but these corn tortilla chips are just as good straight out of the pack too!). Better yet, our famous recipes are on the back of every Tostitos pack so you can get inspired before your next Mexican-style night with friends.

Made for Entertaining Friends and Family
Tostitos are more than just corn chips and dips. They're the ideal additions for hosting parties, events or simple gatherings. Tostitos corn tortilla chips contain the perfect amount of Mexican-style flavours to complement all your creative combinations of toppings and dips. Whether you're looking for a bowl filler during footy finals or a versatile addition to your Christmas Holiday spread, Tostitos will have your guests craving more the minute the golden strips hit their lips. What's more, they're made with no MSG, artificial flavours or preservatives so you can feel confident in serving them up for snacking at your next party.

Say Hola! To the Best Couch Companion Around
No one likes watching the same shows and movies on repeat, so why eat the same snacks? Tostitos introduces an unlimited amount of flavour combinations to fit whatever you're feeling throughout the week. Whether you need a comforting corn chip and dip pairing to get you through a tear-jerking movie or you need that unbeatable crunch with your favourite lunch snacks, Tostitos provides the perfect snacking option for every situation.
  • The subtle splash of lime is a perfect pairing with all your favourite fresh toppings and dips.

  • Let your guests choose their own way to get snacking with the best base of corn chips around.

  • No artificial colours or flavours.

  • Perfect bowl filler for your next Christmas Holiday gathering or Footy Finals hosting.

  • Experience entertainment your way with the versatility of Tostitos Tortilla Corn Chips.
ingredients: Corn, Canola Oil, Maltodextrin, Salt, Sugar, Lime Juice Powder, Dextrose, Food Acids (Citric Acid, Sodium Diacetate), Natural Flavours (Milk), Sour Cream Powder (Milk), Buttermilk Powder (Milk), Sunflower Oil, Antioxidants (Tocopherols, Ascorbic Acid, Rosemary Extract).
allergens: Contains Gluten, Milk, Soy

name: Lindor Assorted Chocolate Balls Gift Box
description: LINDT LINDOR GIFT BOX CHOCOLATE BALLS:ASSORTED:.:235 GRAM
long_description:
Wherever and whenever you take a LINDOR moment, it just seems to make life feel so much more sublime. When you unwrap LINDOR and break its delicate chocolate shell, the irresistibly smooth filling starts to melt gently carrying you away in a moment of bliss. LINDOR, created by the Lindt Master Chocolatiers.

At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.

Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt LINDOR - smooth-melting assorted chocolate truffles, 235g

  • The ideal gift for every occasion, from Valentine's Day to Easter, birthdays and Christmas.

  • An assortment of the finest Lindt milk, dark, white and hazelnut chocolate.

  • With decades of expertise, the Lindt Master Chocolatiers capture perfection in Swiss chocolate.

  • Melt away into a moment of bliss with our irresistibly smooth LINDOR assorted chocolate balls.
ingredients: Sugar, vegetable fats, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, whole milk powder, skim milk powder, lactose (milk), milk fat, hazelnuts, emulsifier (soy lecithin), barley malt extract, flavourings.
allergens: Contains Gluten, Hazelnut, Milk, Soy

They are a symbol of care and sophistication, making them the ideal stocking stuffer, secret Santa gift, or elegant present for that special someone this holiday season. name: Raffaello 26 Pack Gift Box
description: FERRERO RAFFAELLO T26 260G
long_description:
Raffaello, the irresistible white chocolate treat.

Indulge in the exquisite taste of Raffaello, a unique white chocolate confection that will transport your taste buds to a tropical paradise. This isn't your ordinary chocolate; it's a delicate balance of textures and flavours that's perfect for any occasion, especially when you're looking for a lighter, more refreshing treat.
  • For the Almond and White Chocolate Lovers: At the heart of each Raffaello is a whole white almond, surrounded by a smooth, creamy filling and encased in a crisp wafer shell. This unique combination delivers a delightful, chocolate experience that's both refreshing and satisfying.

  • Delicate Coconut Delight: What truly sets Raffaello apart is the generous coating of fragrant, finely shredded coconut. This gives it a distinctive, slightly sweet flavour and a unique texture that melts in your mouth, offering a delightful twist on traditional white chocolate.

  • The Ideal Gift: For your friends and family at every occasion especially Valentines, Mother's Day, Christmas, and birthday celebrations.

Wherever and whenever you take a LINDOR moment, it just seems to make life feel so much more sublime. When you unwrap LINDOR and break its delicate chocolate shell, the irresistibly smooth filling starts to melt gently carrying you away in a moment of bliss. LINDOR, created by the Lindt Master Chocolatiers.
At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.

name: Rocher Chocolate Gift Box 5 Pack
description: FERRERO ROCHER CHOCOLATE 5PK
long_description:
This Christmas, elevate your holiday celebrations and gift giving with the exquisite delight of Ferrero Rocher. A quintessential part of the Australian Christmas season, this timeless classic is loved the world over and is the perfect answer to What are the best Christmas gifts for chocolate lovers?

Created with Ferrero expertise, each praline is a symphony of textures and tastes, making it an ideal Christmas treat. It begins with a whole roasted hazelnut nestled within a creamy milk chocolate filling. This delectable heart is then enveloped by a crisp chocolate wafer, all encased in smooth milk chocolate and delicately adorned with finely chopped hazelnuts.

What makes Ferrero Rocher a truly special Christmas gift?

  • A Unique Multi-Layered Christmas Indulgence: From the satisfying crunch of the wafer to the smooth melt of the chocolate and the delightful surprise of the whole hazelnut, every bite is a festive adventure for your senses. It's a must-have for Christmas parties and family gatherings.

  • Premium Quality, Always: We use only the finest ingredients, ensuring a truly luxurious chocolate experience that elevates any Christmas occasion or holiday table.

  • Individually Wrapped for Freshness and Sharing: Each Ferrero Rocher is elegantly wrapped in its signature golden foil, making them perfect for sharing with family and friends or adding a touch of sparkle to your Christmas hamper. They are the easiest way to give a little luxury!

  • The Epitome of Thoughtful Gift Giving: Make a lasting impression with these iconic pralines. They are a symbol of care and sophistication, making them the ideal stocking stuffer, secret Santa gift, or elegant present for that special someone this holiday season. They truly are the best Christmas chocolate.

  • Make your Christmas unforgettable. Find the perfect Ferrero Rocher gift pack for all your holiday gifting needs!

description: KINDER JOY 20G
long_description:
Get ready for a roar-some adventure with Kinder Joy's NEW Jurassic World Dino Color Collection! This is more than just a delicious chocolate treat; it's a dual-experience of irresistible flavor and thrilling surprise, perfect for kids and adults alike. Enclosed in the iconic Kinder egg chocolate shape, this special edition brings the excitement of the prehistoric world right into your hands.

One half of the egg delivers Kinder Joy's signature multi-sensory chocolate taste experience. You'll savor the delightful contrast of creamy, sweet milky layers paired with crispy wafer bites filled with rich cocoa cream. It's a beloved classic flavor that makes for the perfect treat for kids and a comforting favorite for the whole family.

The other side of the egg chocolate holds an exciting surprise: a piece from the Jurassic World Dino Color Collection waiting to be discovered! Snack, play, and discover with a total of 24 Jurassic World 3D dinos to collect. These aren't just any toys-they come in bold, vibrant colors, and some even have the super-cool feature of glowing in the dark! Every Kinder Joy is a chance to unbox a new dinosaur figurine or accessory, offering endless prehistoric fun and the thrill of collecting.

Grab your Kinder Joy today and bring home the magic, the toys, and the adventure of the Jurassic World Dino Color Collection!

  • Two Treats in One: Enjoy the unique multi-sensory taste of creamy chocolate layers and crispy wafer bites, combined with an exciting collectible toy surprise.

  • Exclusive Jurassic World Collection: Collect 24 unique 3D dino toys from the NEW Jurassic World Dino Color Collection, offering a vast and exciting challenge for all collectors.

  • Vibrant & Glow-in-the-Dark Figures: Discover special edition toys in bold, vibrant colors, including rare figurines that glow in the dark for extra play value.

  • Perfect Family Fun: The ideal egg chocolate with toys to share; a beloved classic chocolate treat that guarantees a moment of fun and surprise for kids and the whole family.

  • *Toys may vary upon delivery

  • *RSPO sustainable and certified palm oil. RSPO-1106110.

CONTAINS MILK, GLUTEN, WHEAT, SOY.

long_description:
Discover the magic within each Kinder Surprise! This iconic chocolate egg is a delightful treat for kids (and adults too!), offering a unique 3-in-1 experience. Enjoy a delicious double-layered shell of fine milk chocolate with a creamy milky white lining, followed by the thrill of a surprise moment, and a fantastic toy to play with.

Even better, every Kinder Surprise holds a different Veterinary World toys , figures, and accessories. It's the perfect combination of a tasty treat and an exciting discovery, guaranteed to bring a smile.

*Every Kinder Surprise chocolate contains a random toy upon delivery.

  • TRUSTED QUALITY, UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS: Parents can trust Kinder Surprise for its high-quality milk chocolate and commitment to safe, fun toys, creating memorable moments of joy and surprise for families.

  • DISCOVER VETERINARY WORLD: Every Kinder Surprise Pink holds a different Veterinary World toys, character figures and accessories to play with.

name: Bueno White Chocolate Bar
description: KINDER BUENO. WHITE 39G
long_description:
Treat yourself to Kinder Bueno White, a delicate white chocolate bar that brings together seriously indulgent flavour sensations with a surprisingly light finish. It's an exciting sensation for your tastebuds and a champion choice for any chocolate snacking moment!

Every Kinder Bueno White chocolate bar is individually wrapped to guarantee tip-top quality and freshness. Whether you're flat out on the go, needing a quick choc break, hitting the road for a trip, kicking back watching the footy, glued to a movie, or even celebrating special moments like Valentine's Day - Kinder Bueno White chocolate bar is the perfect treat for every occasion. This isn't your average choc bar, it's an experience!

Treat yourself to a Bueno White, you deserve it!

  • DOUBLE THE CHOCOLATE GOODNESS: Each pack comes with two individually wrapped chocolate bars, perfect for sharing with a mate or saving one for later

  • PURE WHITE CHOCOLATE BLISS: Experience the smooth, creamy taste and velvety texture of premium white chocolate, perfectly complementing the crunchy wafer and rich hazelnut cream for a truly unique chocolate experience that's lighter than other milk chocolates.

  • BEYOND THE USUAL SNACKING: This isn't just another choc bar; it's a sophisticated twist on the classic Kinder Bueno. With the unique addition of white chocolate and cocoa meringue that adds an extra layer of texture and a subtle chocolatey hint, elevating your snacking game.

name: Chocolate Bar Whipped Nougat
description: MILKY WAY CHOCOLATE BAR WHIPPED NOUGAT 45G
long_description:
NOW IN A RECYCLABLE PAPER-BASED WRAPPER! When you need an out-of-this-world chocolate snack, unwrap a MilkyWay chocolate bar and enjoy a deliciously light and simple treat! This famous chocolate bar has been delighting the world since 1923, thanks to its yummy lightly whipped chocolate malt flavoured nougat enrobed in smooth milk chocolate. With no artificial colours and flavours, MilkyWay chocolate is the perfect bar for a mid-afternoon snack and for lunchboxes. Pack some melt-in-the-mouth MILKYWAY chocolates for family road trips, stash some in the pantry for TV snacks or why not whip up some iconic MilkyWay blondies, brownies or cookies!
  • Lightly whipped chocolate malt flavoured nougat enrobed in smooth milk chocolate.

  • Now in Recyclable PAPER-BASED PACKAGING.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Two delicious chocolate bar portions to snack on with a friend (or save for later)!

  • Milk chocolate bar also available in a Fun Size Share bag.

name: Surprise Chocolate Egg
description: KINDER SURPRISE CHOCOLATE EGG 20G
long_description:
Unleash the Hero Within: Kinder Surprise x DC Playmobil

Give your little ones the ultimate treat with the Kinder Surprise DC Edition. This isn't just a snack; it's an iconic three-in-one experience that combines the creamy, melt-in-your-mouth chocolate kids love with the thrill of a hidden collectible.

In this new range, the legendary Heroes of DC meet the classic, world-renowned Playmobil design. Whether they are unboxing a caped crusader or a powerful ally, these chocolate eggs deliver a moment of pure wonder and creative play for your kids. With 16 unique Heroes to discover, every egg is a new opportunity to spark your child's imagination. *Toys may vary.

  • Premium White & Milk Chocolate: Signature Kinder taste featuring a delicious double-layered shell-fine milk chocolate on the outside with a smooth, milky white lining on the inside.

  • DC x Playmobil Toys: Every egg contains a clever, high-quality toy featuring a DC Hero reimagined in the iconic Playmobil style, perfect for your kids to discover and share.

  • The Ultimate Surprise Moment: Designed to create lasting memories, these eggs combine the joy of a sweet treat with the sustained emotion of the surprise, keeping your kids engaged long after the chocolate is gone.

  • *Toys may vary upon delivery

  • *RSPO sustainable and certified palm oil.

name: Milk Chocolate Bar Caramel Nougat
description: MARS MILK CHOCOLATE BAR CARAMEL NOUGAT 47G
long_description:
NOW IN A RECYCLABLE PAPER-BASED WRAPPER! With the legendary taste of soft nougat, slathered in caramel and covered in thick milk chocolate, MARS bars are a delicious treat to reward yourself. Since 1932, MARS bars have been the treat of choice for people whenever they've done something BIG or small. Keep these delicious chocolate bar snacks at the ready in your pantry, or why not unwrap a few MARS chocolates to make big, bold and incredibly moreish MARS bar slices, cheesecakes, rocky road and muffins? So, if you're looking for an afternoon treat, relax and reward yourself with a legendary MARS bar, proudly made in Australia.
  • Includes a 47g Bar of MARS Chocolate bar with chocolate, caramel & nougat.

  • Now in Recyclable PAPER-BASED PACKAGING.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Soft nougat, slathered in caramel, covered in thick milk chocolate.

  • MARS chocolate bar also available in a fun size share pack.

name: Surprise Chocolate Egg Blue
description: KINDER SURPRISE CHOCOLATE EGG BLUE 20G
long_description:
Discover the magic within each Kinder Surprise! This iconic chocolate egg is a delightful treat for kids (and adults too!), offering a unique 3-in-1 experience. Enjoy a delicious double-layered shell of fine milk chocolate with a creamy milky white lining, followed by the thrill of a surprise moment, and a fantastic toy to play with.

Even better, every Kinder Surprise holds a different Dragon Adventure toys and figures. It's the perfect combination of a tasty treat and an exciting discovery, guaranteed to bring a smile.

*Every Kinder Surprise chocolate contains a random toy upon delivery.

  • DUAL DELIGHT IN EVERY BITE: Kinder Surprise offers the unique combination of a delicious chocolate egg and an exciting mystery toy inside, providing both a tasty treat and an engaging play experience all in one.

  • ENCOURAGES IMAGINATIVE PLAY: Beyond the delicious chocolate, the hidden toys spark curiosity and creativity, encouraging children to engage in imaginative play and discover new adventures.

  • TRUSTED QUALITY, UNFORGETTABLE MOMENTS: Parents can trust Kinder Surprise for its high-quality milk chocolate and commitment to safe, fun toys, creating memorable moments of joy and surprise for families.

  • DISCOVER DRAGON ADVENTURES FIGURES & ACCESSORIES: Every Kinder Surprise Blue holds a Dragon toy. With 22 Dragon figures and accessories in the collection.

  • *Toys may vary upon delivery
ingredients: Milk Chocolate 47% (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole Milk Powder, Skim Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass, Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soy), Flavouring: Vanillin), Interior: Whole Milk Powder, Sugar, Vegetable Fats (Shea, Palm (Sustainable and segregated certified palm oil)), Emulsifier (Lecithins) (Soy), Flavouring (Vanillin). Total Milk Constituents: 32%. Total Cocoa Solids: 15%.

long_description: Limited-Edition KITKAT Formula 1 Racing Car 29g. Rev up your taste buds with the NESTLE KITKAT Milk Chocolate F1 Racing Car! Perfect for Formula 1 enthusiasts and chocolate lovers alike, this unique treat combines the iconic KITKAT crunch with the thrill of racing. Each bar features a rich choc centre with crunchy KITKAT wafer pieces, all coated in a smooth milk chocolate shell shaped like a sleek F1 car.Take a break and feel the rush with limited-edition KITKAT F1 Racing Car. Whether you're watching the race or just need a moment to yourself, this delicious treat is sure to satisfy.Have a break, have a KITKAT.The F1 logo and related marks are trademarks of FOL BV

name: Bueno Chocolate Bar
description: KINDER CHOCOLATE BUENO 43G
long_description:
Get ready to treat your tastebuds with Kinder Bueno, the chocolate bar that brings together indulgent flavour sensations with a light finish. Each chocolate bar promises a melt-in-your-mouth crispy wafer, wrapped in creamy milk chocolate, bursting with a smooth hazelnut cream, and meticulously finished with a fine dark chocolate drizzle. It's a genuine showstopper for any snacking moment!


Every Kinder Bueno chocolate bar is individually wrapped to guarantee tip-top quality, so you know you're always getting the good stuff. Whether you're flat out on the go, needing a quick choc break, hitting the road for a trip, kicking back watching the footy, glued to a movie, or even celebrating special moments like Valentine's Day - Kinder Bueno chocolate bar is the perfect treat for every occasion. This isn't just a chocolate, it's an experience!


Treat yourself to a Bueno, you deserve it!

  • DOUBLE DELIGHT CHOCOLATE BAR: Each pack comes with two individually wrapped chocolate bars, perfect for sharing with a mate or saving one for later

  • ULTIMATE CHOCOLATE SNACK: Whether you're smashing out assignments at uni or just chilling with your group of friends, Kinder Bueno Chocolate Bar is the ultimate snack to keep everyone happy.

  • A TASTE SENSATION: Experience the perfect blend of creamy milk chocolate, rich hazelnut cream, and a satisfyingly crispy wafer - a delightful texture and flavour combo that'll keep you coming back for more.

  • LITE YET SATISFYING SNACKING: Kinder Bueno chocolate bar offers a truly indulgent yet surprisingly light snacking experience, making it perfect anytime.
ingredients: MILK CHOCOLATE-COVERED WAFER WITH SMOOTH MILK AND HAZELNUT FILLING INGREDIENTS: MILK CHOCOLATE (31.5%) (SUGAR, COCOA BUTTER, COCOA MASS, SKIM MILK POWDER, ANHYDROUS MILKFAT (MILK, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOV), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), SUGAR, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*, WHEAT FLOUR, HAZELNUTS (10.5%), SKIM MILK POWDER, WHOLE MILK POWDER, DARK CHOCOLATE (SUGAR, COCOA MASS, COCOA BUTTER, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOV), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER, EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOV), RAISING AGENT (SODIUM BICARBONATE), SALT, FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL MILK SOLIDS: 19.5%. TOTAL COCOA SOLIDS: 14.3%. WAFER: 12%. MILK CHOCOLATE CONTAINS 42% OF COCOA SOLIDS AND 14.2% OF MILK SOLIDS. CONTAINS MILK, GLUTEN, WHEAT, HAZELNUTS, SOY. *RSPO sustainable and certified palm oil. RSPO-1106110

name: Chocolate 4 Treat Pack
description: KINDER:CHOCOLATE 4PK:.:50 GRAM
long_description:
Discover the magic of Kinder Chocolate, the beloved little chocolate bar that's been bringing smiles to kids for years. Each individually wrapped 12.5g bar features a deliciously mild and milky filling, generously coated in our signature Kinder milk chocolate. This unique combination creates an irresistible taste experience that's both creamy and satisfying, a stand-out amongst other kids chocolates.

Kinder Chocolate is made with 33% milk ingredients without any artificial colours or preservatives, ensuring a pure and wholesome chocolate treat. It's perfect for little taste buds and tummies, offering a reassuring choice for parents who prioritise quality and simplicity in their kids' treats. So, whether you're looking for a delightful everyday chocolate, a convenient kids treat, or the perfect addition to a party bag, Kinder Chocolate is the answer. Grab a pack today and share those little moments that bring big smiles!

  • MADE WITH 33% MILK INGREDIENTS: We pack our delicious milk chocolate with a generous 33% milk, offering a milder, creamier taste that's specifically designed for children's palates and a source of dairy goodness.

  • NO ARTIFICIAL COLOURS & PRESERVATIVES: Parents can rest easy knowing Kinder Chocolate contains no artificial colours or preservatives, making it a wholesome and reassuring choice for your kids' treats.

  • PERFECT FOR SHARING AT ANY OCCASIONS: From the excitement of trick or treating at Halloween to the joy of birthday parties - these chocolate bars are handy addition to a party bag. Pack these individually wrapped chocolates in lunchboxes for a delightful recess surprise, bring them on road trips to keep spirits high, share them at family gatherings, and always keep a bag handy for your lolly bowls - they're sure to be a crowd-pleaser!

  • GET READY FOR HALLOWEEN: Kinder Chocolate bars are perfect for sharing at any occasion, but especially for the excitement of trick-or-treating. These individually wrapped chocolates are a convenient and delightful addition to any lolly bowl or party bag, making them a sure-fire crowd-pleaser for little ghosts and ghouls.
