long_description:
NOW IN A RECYCLABLE PAPER-BASED WRAPPER! With the legendary taste of soft nougat, slathered in caramel and covered in thick milk chocolate, MARS bars are a delicious treat to reward yourself. Since 1932, MARS bars have been the treat of choice for people whenever they've done something BIG or small. With two delicious portions in one MARS bar pack, you can spread out your afternoon treat or split the pack with a friend! Keep these delicious chocolate bar snacks at the ready in your pantry, or why not unwrap a few MARS chocolates to make big, bold and incredibly moreish MARS bar slices, cheesecakes, rocky road and muffins? So, if you're looking for an afternoon treat, relax and reward yourself with a legendary MARS bar, proudly made in Australia.
  • Two delicious MARS chocolate bar portions to treat yourself or a friend (or save for later)!

  • Now in Recyclable PAPER-BASED PACKAGING.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Soft nougat, slathered in caramel, covered in thick milk chocolate.

  • MARS chocolate bar also available in a fun size share pack.

name: Surprise Chocolate 3 pack
description: KINDER SURPRISE CHOCOLATE 3PK
long_description:
Unleash the Hero Within: Kinder Surprise x DC Playmobil

Give your little ones the ultimate treat with the Kinder Surprise DC Edition. This isn't just a snack; it's an iconic three-in-one experience that combines the creamy, melt-in-your-mouth chocolate kids love with the thrill of a hidden collectible.

In this new range, the legendary Heroes of DC meet the classic, world-renowned Playmobil design. Whether they are unboxing a caped crusader or a powerful ally, these chocolate eggs deliver a moment of pure wonder and creative play for your kids. With 16 unique Heroes to discover, every egg is a new opportunity to spark your child's imagination. *Toys may vary.

  • Premium White & Milk Chocolate: Signature Kinder taste featuring a delicious double-layered shell-fine milk chocolate on the outside with a smooth, milky white lining on the inside.

  • DC x Playmobil Toys: Every egg contains a clever, high-quality toy featuring a DC Hero reimagined in the iconic Playmobil style, perfect for your kids to discover and share.

  • The Ultimate Surprise Moment: Designed to create lasting memories, these eggs combine the joy of a sweet treat with the sustained emotion of the surprise, keeping your kids engaged long after the chocolate is gone.

  • *Toys may vary upon delivery

  • *RSPO sustainable and certified palm oil.

Experience the same delicious and beloved taste of Reese's Peanut Butter Cups in a fun and convenient unwrapped form with Reese's Peanut Butter Cups Minis Unwrapped! These bite-sized peanut butter cups are made with the same creamy peanut butter filling and smooth milk chocolate coating as the classic cups, but without the hassle of unwrapping each piece. Perfect for snacking on the go, adding to your favourite recipes, or sharing with friends and family, Reese's Peanut Butter Cups Minis Unwrapped offers the same iconic and satisfying taste in a more convenient and fun-to-eat form. Indulge in the classic and irresistible flavour that has made Reese's a favourite for generations with these minis unwrapped!

There's a reason why about one billion little chocolate PODS are enjoyed by Aussies every year! Invented and made in Australia by Aussies for Aussies, they're simply the best bite-sized snacks in a chocolate bag for movie nights, footy TV, road trips, boating, camping, coffee dates, beach parties and everything in between. Once bitten, forever smitten!

name: Boodles Chocolate Clusters Peanut And Pretzel
description: SPRINGHILL FARM BOODLES CHOCOLATE CLUSTERS PEANUT AND PRETZEL 90G
long_description:
Crunchy clusters of puffed ancient grains, seeds and chunky peanut and pretzel pieces all smothered in smooth chocolate.

Love an old school crackle? We hear you! Weve brought back that childhood fav and put our spin on it. Combining seeds, puffed ancient grains, peanuts and pretzels then smothering them all in creamy chocolate they might not be pretty but they sure are delicious. As a second-gen Aussie business weve been making snacks for over 40 years. While our batch sizes have increased over the years, were still obsessed with Making Snacking Happier and are passionate about making snacks that taste amazing!

Tapioca Starch), Pretzels (Wheat, Gluten), Rice Cocoa Crisps, Roasted Buckwheat, Quinoa Crisps, Cacao
Butter, Himalayan Pink Rock Salt, Hazelnuts

name: Dairy Milk Marvellous Creations Bites
description: CADBURY DAIRY MILK MARVELLOUS CREATIONS BITES 120G
long_description:
Cadbury Dairy Milk Marvellous Creations Bites in Dairy Milk milk chocolate. Explode onto the scene at your next get-together with the marvellous bites of Cadbury Dairy Milk Marvellous Creations.

A beacon of fun, this milk chocolate bites are perfect for sharing with each piece bringing a unique element of fun. With three different inclusions that delight the senses, which is your favourite? Popping candy, raspberry flavoured candy chips and raspberry flavoured bites.

Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa. Cadbury believes that tasting good and doing good should go hand in hand. The cocoa life program aims to improve the livelihoods of farming communities and the landscapes where cocoa grows.

The equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g of Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate.

Made in Australia from Imported and Local Ingredients.
  • Cadbury Dairy milk Marvellous Creations Bites

  • Popping Candy,raspberry flavoured candy chips and raspberry flavoured bites

  • Made in Australia from Imported and Local Ingredients.

  • Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa

long_description:
Call off the search! Because those deliciously fun bite size chocolate snacks you've been looking for are right here in this bulk chocolate party bag of M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate legends! These mouthwatering M&M'S Milk Chocolate covered peanuts in thin crisp shells have been sending chocolate lovers nuts across the globe since 1954. That's because these chocolate treats make the perfect screen-time chocolate snacks, whether you're sharing them as movie night chocolate treats or enjoying them when you stream your favourite shows. For something different, why not try sprinkling their happy M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate colours into baking recipes, popcorn TV snacks or even banana splits! Did you know that M&M'S Chocolates were the first lollies to rocket into space? So for chocolate snacks that are literally out of this world, grab this bag of scrumptious M&M'S Chocolates! Party at your place? It starts with M&M'S PEANUT Chocolates.

Includes a 650g Chocolate Bag of M&M'S PEANUT Milk Chocolate Bite Size Snacks.

name: Peanut Milk Chocolate Snack & Share Bag
description: M&M'S PEANUT MILK CHOCOLATE SNACK & SHARE BAG 380G
long_description:
Call off the search! Because those deliciously fun bite size chocolate snacks you've been looking for are right here in this share pack of M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate legends! These mouthwatering M&M'S Milk Chocolate covered peanuts in thin crisp shells have been sending chocolate lovers nuts across the globe since 1954. That's because these chocolate treats make the perfect screen-time chocolate snacks, whether you're sharing them as movie night chocolate treats or enjoying them when you stream your favourite shows. For something different, why not try sprinkling their happy M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate colours into baking recipes, popcorn TV snacks or even banana splits! Did you know that M&M'S Chocolates were the first lollies to rocket into space? So for chocolate snacks that are literally out of this world, grab this bag of scrumptious M&M'S Chocolates! Party at your place? It starts with M&M'S PEANUT Chocolates.

Includes a 380g Chocolate Bag of M&M'S PEANUT Milk Chocolate Bite Size Snacks.
  • Includes 380g M&M'S Peanut Milk Chocolate bite size snacks.

  • Roasted peanuts covered in milk chocolate surrounded by a colourful thin crisp shell.

  • Ideal for movie nights or game nights chocolate snacks and to share with friends and family at your next party.

  • Get creative and sprinkle these delicious M&M'S bite size chocolates over ice cream or decorate cupcakes in colourful chocolate fun.

  • Made in Australia.

What's a good time to enjoy snacking on SNICKERS PODS? Movie time, road trip time, footy time, ANY TIME! That's because yummy chocolate PODS were invented in Australia for Australian good times, and Aussies now enjoy around one billion little PODS every year! Bite into the crispy baked wafer that's ingeniously shaped like a shell, and you'll uncover a delectable SNICKERS filling of peanutty caramel topped with creamy milk chocolate. Delicious! You can hand them around as TV snacks, add them to party lolly bowls, or stash them in the pantry. Once bitten, forever smitten!
  • Crispy wafer shell, SNICKERS flavoured caramel filling and a smooth milk chocolate topping. It's the perfect treat or snack for any time of the day!

  • PODS SNICKERS are a delightful addition to your everyday snacking, social get-togethers and movie nights.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Halal Certified.

  • Made in Australia.

name: Extra Chocolate Snack & Share Bag
description: MALTESERS EXTRA CHOCOLATE SNACK AND SHARE BAG 120G
long_description:
Craving a lighter way to enjoy EXTRA chocolate? Then these delicious MALTESERS are for YOU! This sharing pack creates light-hearted moments during gossip sessions with your besties or family road trips when everyone deserves an extra chocolatey snack. Each bite gives you a melt-in-the-mouth experience thanks to the crisp and light malt centre covered with lots more smooth milk chocolate deliciousness. Blend them with milk for an extra chocolatey MALTESERS shake, bake them into cakes, fudge and rocky road, pour them into lolly bowls or pass them around for movie night snacks. One for them, two for you...
  • With each bite you can taste the irresistible flavour of our extra milk choc coating, along with our classic crisp malt centres.

  • Maltesers Extra Choc are perfect for those informal moments between friends, whether that be curled up on the couch in front of the TV or commandeering a corner table in the office.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Halal Certified.
ingredients: SUGAR, MILK SOLIDS, COCOA BUTTER, COCOA MASS, MALT EXTRACT (BARLEY), GLUCOSE SYRUP, VEGETABLE FAT, MALTODEXTRIN, EMULSIFIERS (SOY LECITHIN, 492), RAISING AGENTS (501, 500), VEGETABLE GUM (440), SALT, FLAVOUR. MILK CHOCOLATE CONTAINS COCOA SOLIDS 25%, MILK SOLIDS 23%.
allergens:
Contains Gluten, Milk, Soy
May Contain Wheat
Free From Almond, Brazil nut, Cashew, Crustacean, Egg, Fish, Hazelnut, Lupin, Macadamia, Mollusc, Peanut, Pecan, Pine Nut, Pistachio, Sesame, Sulphites, Walnut

name: Milk Chocolate Snack Party Bag
description: MALTESERS MILK CHOCOLATE SNACK PARTY BAG 280G
long_description:
Road trips, gossip sessions, coffee dates, party fun, this family share bag of milk chocolate MALTESERS is highly social and simply loves creating lighthearted moments with everyone. Each bite gives you a melt-in-the-mouth experience thanks to the crisp and light malt centre covered with smooth milk chocolate deliciousness. Try adding them to popcorn for a movie night snack or create a bowl of lollies for the party table. And if you're feeling in a baking mood these crunchy chocolatey treats are famous for creating spectacular displays on frosted cakes and taste magic in rocky road fudge cheesecakes and more.
  • Includes 280g bag of MALTESERS milk chocolates confectionery.

  • Crisp light malt centres covered with smooth milk chocolate deliciousness.

  • Perfect to share at a party or add to a lolly bowl.

  • Try them on your ice cream. MALTESERS is also perfect to add as a baking decoration to your next cake.

name: Bueno Mini Chocolate
description: KINDER BUENO MINI CHOCOLATE 97G
long_description:
A Spooktacular Treat for the Halloween Season!

Dive into the sensational world of Kinder Bueno Mini, the perfect chocolate bar to bring serious flavour to your Halloween celebrations. Each melt-in-your-mouth piece promises a crispy wafer wrapped in creamy milk chocolate, packed to the brim with smooth hazelnut cream, and finished with a fine dark chocolate drizzle. It's a genuine showstopper for any spooky snacking moment!

This isn't just any chocolate bar; it's a whole bag of individually wrapped mini delights, ideal for trick-or-treaters and Halloween party favours. This pack of 18 mini Kinder Bueno bars is perfect for sharing with friends and family. Each mini wafer bar is individually wrapped to guarantee tip-top quality and freshness, so you know you're always handing out the good stuff. Perfect for sharing with your mates, dishing out at parties, or just keeping your lolly bowl stocked for when that Halloween chocolate craving hits.

  • PERFECT FOR SHARING: This chocolate share bag comes with 18 individually wrapped mini chocolate bars, making it a perfect choice for dishing out at parties, movie nights, or just sharing with your besties - no worries at all!

  • SAME GREAT BUENO IN MINI SIZE: Get all the deliciousness of your favourite Kinder Bueno chocolate bar but in a perfectly sized mini format. It's great for portion control or just when you fancy a little bit of something sweet.

  • STOCK UP & ENJOY: This generous share bag is perfect for stocking your pantry so you've always got a fantastic snack on hand. Grab a mini choc bar whenever you fancy a moment of pure snacking bliss!

  • PERFECT ADDITION TO ANY HALLOWEEN SPREAD: Ditch the ordinary this Halloween! Kinder Bueno Mini's unique and sophisticated flavour profile makes it a standout choice for any lolly bowl or dessert platter. The individually wrapped pieces are not only convenient for sharing but also add a touch of indulgence to your spooky season festivities, delighting both kids and adults.

name: Peanut Milk Chocolate Snack & Share Bag
description: M&M'S PEANUT MILK CHOCOLATE SNACK & SHARE BAG 180G
long_description:
Call off the search! Because those deliciously fun bite size chocolate snacks you've been looking for are right here in this share pack of M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate legends! These mouthwatering M&M'S Milk Chocolate covered peanuts in thin crisp shells have been sending chocolate lovers nuts across the globe since 1954. That's because these chocolate treats make the perfect screen-time chocolate snacks, whether you're sharing them as movie night chocolate treats or enjoying them when you stream your favourite shows. For something different, why not try sprinkling their happy M&M'S PEANUT Chocolate colours into baking recipes, popcorn TV snacks or even banana splits! Did you know that M&M'S Chocolates were the first lollies to rocket into space? So for chocolate snacks that are literally out of this world, grab this bag of scrumptious M&M'S Chocolates! Party at your place? It starts with M&M'S PEANUT Chocolates.

Includes a 180g Chocolate Bag of M&M'S PEANUT Milk Chocolate Bite Size Snacks.
  • Includes 180g M&M'S Peanut Milk Chocolate bite size snacks.

  • Roasted peanuts covered in milk chocolate surrounded by a colourful thin crisp shell.

  • Ideal for movie nights or game nights chocolate snacks and to share with friends and family at your next party.

  • Get creative and sprinkle these delicious M&M'S bite size chocolates over ice cream or decorate cupcakes in colourful chocolate fun.

  • Made in Australia.
ingredients: Milk Chocolate Covered Peanuts in a Thin Crisp Shell. M&M'S Peanut Contain Milk Chocolate 46%, Peanuts 22%. Milk Chocolate Contains Cocoa Solids 29%, Milk Solids 21%.

name: Dairy Milk Breakaway Chocolate Block
description: CADBURY DAIRY MILK BREAKAWAY CHOCOLATE BLOCK
long_description:
Cadbury chocolate just got better. Layers of crispy wafer, creme and a creamy choc centre are coated with Cadbury's signature Dairy Milk Chocolate in Cadbury Dairy Milk Breakaway. This chunky treat delivers a delicious twist on an old favourite. Share with friends and family for dessert or make someone's day with a sweet surprise.

Sustainably sourced cocoa. We partner with cocoa farmers to help them gain knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.
  • Milk Chocolate

  • Layers of Crispy Wafer

  • Supporting Sustainably Sourced Cocoa

  • Proudly Made in Tasmania

  • Perfect for Sharing

name: Tasmanian Mint Dark Chocolate Block
description: KITKAT TASMANIAN MINT DARK CHOCOLATE BLOCK 160G
long_description:
Discover Dark Down Under! Discover the indulgent dark chocolate experience of KITKAT Tasmanian Mint Dark Chocolate Block. Just unwrap, snap off a finger and savour the swirls of rich dark chocolate and mint chocolate.
 
  • 11 crisp batch baked wafer fingers smothered with delicious swirls of rich dark chocolate and mint chocolate using mint oil sourced from the beautiful state of Tasmania.
  • Made with sustainably sourced cocoa certified by the Rainforest Alliance.
  • Official chit-chat partner of R U OK?, starting meaningful conversations with colleagues, friends and family.
  • Proudly made in our Australian factory, in Campbellfield, Victoria.
  • Suitable for vegetarians.
     
    Have a break, have a KITKAT.
ingredients: Ingredients Sugar, Cocoa Mass^, Wheat Flour, Vegetable Fats [Emulsifier ( Soy Lecithin)], Milk Solids, Choc Paste ( Milk , Wheat , Soy ), Emulsifiers ( Soy Lecithin, 476), Cocoa^, Cocoa Butter^, Colour (141), Tasmanian Mint Oil (0.1%), Raising Agent (Sodium Bicarbonate), Salt, Flavour [Colour (150d)], Yeast, Processing Aid ( Wheat ). Contains Milk, Wheat, Gluten, Soy. May Contain Tree Nuts, Other Gluten Containing Ingredients. Product Contains 62% Dark Chocolate, 14% Mint Flavoured Choc, 24% Wafer. Cadbury Caramilk Marble is caramelised white chocolate & milk chocolate with a hazelnut praline centre.
Proudly made in Tasmania.
Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa. Cadbury believes that tasting good and doing good should go hand in hand. The cocoa life program aims to improve the livelihoods of farming communities and the landscapes where cocoa grows.

name: Block Chocolate Dark Ghana 72%
description: WHITTAKER'S BLOCK CHOCOLATE DARK GHANA 72% 250G
long_description:
We start with the pick of the finest Rainforest Alliance Certifed cocoa beans for our Dark Ghana special blend. Then we lovingly batch-roast them to create this beautifully balanced, 72% dark chocolate with a robust taste. 
Minimum 70% Ghanaian cocoa beans

- 72% Cocoa Creamy Milk Chocolate: Crafted with the finest ingredients.
- Rainforest Alliance Certified: Ethically sourced and sustainable.
- Palm Oil & GMO Free: Pure, natural quality.
- Made in New Zealand: A product of excellence.

Pure Quality
Free from palm oil and GMOs, Whittaker's Dark Ghana Chocolate Block is pure, natural quality. The Cocoa Beans are Rainforest Alliance Certified, ensuring you enjoy an ethically sourced chocolate block. It's a deliciously decadent chocolate experience you can feel good about.

  • Rainforest Alliance Certified

  • Palm Oil Free

  • GMO Free

name: Block Chocolate Creamy Milk Block
description: WHITTAKER'S BLOCK CHOCOLATE CREAMY MILK BLOCK 250G
long_description:
There's a reason they called it ‘creamy'. Whittaker's craft this generous 33% cocoa Creamy Milk block from Ghana's finest cocoa, which is Rainforest Alliance Certified too. Then, for utter smoothness, they refine it five times with their Swiss 5 Roll Refiner.

  • 33% Cocoa Creamy Milk Chocolate: Crafted with the finest ingredients.
  • Rainforest Alliance Certified: Ethically sourced and sustainable.
  • Palm Oil & GMO Free: Pure, natural quality.
  • Made in New Zealand: A product of excellence.

    Whittaker's Creamy Milk is the perfect milk chocolate block. It is 5 Roll Refined, making it super smooth for the ultimate mouth feel. 

    Pure Quality
    Free from palm oil and GMOs, Whittaker's Creamy Milk is pure, natural quality. The Cocoa Beans are Rainforest Alliance Certified, ensuring you enjoy an ethically sourced chocolate block. Made in New Zealand, it's a deliciously decadent chocolate experience you can feel good about. 
  • Rainforest Alliance Certified

  • Palm Oil Free

  • GMO Free

  • New Zealand Made

Our family sharing chocolate block of Cadbury Dairy Milk Top Deck is the best of both worlds, Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate and Dream white chocolate. A smooth & creamy combination that is sure to please any crowd. Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate blocks are proudly made in Tasmania. Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate and Dream white chocolate are made with the equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g. Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa. Cadbury believes that tasting good and doing good should go hand in hand. The cocoa life program aims to improve the livelihoods of farming communities and the landscapes where cocoa grows.

name: Feastables Milk Chocolate Crunch
description: MR. BEAST FEASTABLES MILK CHOCOLATE CRUNCH 35G
long_description:
Indulge in the new and improved MrBeast Feastables Milk Chocolate Crunch Bar, crafted with a reformulated recipe for a richer and more delectable flavour experience. Blended to perfection, this smoother and creamier chocolate candy will melt in your mouth with every bite. The new formula features simple, high-quality ingredients resulting in a deliciously satisfying chocolate snack. Share the joy with this shareable treat, perfect for satisfying cravings and relishing sweet moments.



Product Features:

- New bars, even better taste: Experience the sweet, rich and delectable flavour of the reformulated Feastables MrBeast Milk Chocolate Crunch Bar, crafted for ultimate satisfaction.

- Simple, High-Quality Ingredients: Made with simple yet high-quality ingredients, including crispy puffed rice, ensuring a delicious and wholesome chocolate snack.

- Crisp Rice Infusion: Infused with crisp rice, this chocolate bar offers a satisfying crunch with each bite, adding an extra dimension of texture to the indulgent experience.

- Smoother and Creamier Texture: Blended to make a smooth and creamy chocolate candy, this bar offers a luxurious texture that melts in your mouth with every bite.

- Shareable for All: Perfect for sharing with friends and family, this chocolate bar is a delightful treat for chocolate lovers of all ages.

name: Milk Chocolate Snack & Share Party Bag
description: MALTESERS MILK CHOCOLATE SNACK & SHARE PARTY BAG 480G
long_description:
Road trips, gossip sessions, coffee dates, party fun, this family share bag of milk chocolate MALTESERS is highly social and simply loves creating lighthearted moments with everyone. Each bite gives you a melt-in-the-mouth experience thanks to the crisp and light malt centre covered with smooth milk chocolate deliciousness. Try adding them to popcorn for a movie night snack or create a bowl of lollies for the party table. And if you're feeling in a baking mood these crunchy chocolatey treats are famous for creating spectacular displays on frosted cakes and taste magic in rocky road fudge cheesecakes and more.
  • Includes 480g bag of MALTESERS milk chocolates confectionery.

  • Crisp light malt centres covered with smooth milk chocolate deliciousness.

  • Perfect to share at a party or add to a lolly bowl.

  • Try them on your ice cream. MALTESERS is also perfect to add as a baking decoration to your next cake.

  • Includes 480g bag of MALTESERS.
ingredients: Maltesers Contain Milk Chocolate 75%, Malt Centre 23%. Milk Chocolate Contains Cocoa Solids 25%, Milk Solids 23%.

name: Feastables Milk Chocolate
description: MR. BEAST FEASTABLES MILK CHOCOLATE 60G
long_description:
Indulge in the new and improved MrBeast Feastables Milk Chocolate Bar, crafted with a reformulated recipe for a richer and more delectable flavour experience. Blended to perfection, this smoother and creamier chocolate candy will melt in your mouth with every bite. The new formula features simple, high-quality ingredients resulting in a deliciously satisfying chocolate snack. Share the joy with this shareable treat, perfect for satisfying cravings and relishing sweet moments.



Product Features:



- New bars, even better taste: Experience the sweet, rich and delectable flavour of the reformulated Feastables MrBeast Milk Chocolate Bar, crafted for ultimate satisfaction.

- Simple, High-Quality Ingredients: Made with simple yet high-quality ingredients, including velvety cocoa butter, ensuring a delicious and wholesome chocolate snack.

- Smoother and Creamier Texture: Blended to make a smooth and creamy chocolate candy, this bar offers a luxurious texture that melts in your mouth with every bite.

- Shareable for All: Perfect for sharing with friends and family, this chocolate bar is a delightful treat for chocolate lovers of all ages.

name: Milk Chocolate Block
description: KITKAT MILK CHOCOLATE BLOCK 160 GRAM
long_description:
Break off a finger of the iconic KitKat Milk Chocolate Block when you next need a break. Just unwrap, snap and savour the deliciously smooth milk chocolate.

11 crisp batch baked wafer fingers, smothered in rich milk chocolate

Made with 100% certified sustainable cocoa, supplied through the Nestle Cocoa Plan

Official chit-chat partner of R U OK?, starting meaningful conversations with colleagues, friends and family

Give the planet a break - recycle your wrappers in store through REDcycle.

Proudly made in our Australian factory, in Campbellfield, Victoria.

Suitable for vegetarians.

Have a break, have a KitKat.

name: Caramilk Slices Caramel Chocolate Block
description: CADBURY CARAMILK SLICES CARAMEL CHOCOLATE BLOCK 167G
long_description:
Proudly made in Tasmania, Cadbury have taken inspiration from iconic Australian bakery slices and recreated them for family and friends to share in Cadbury blocks. Made with delicious Cadbury Chocolate each Cadbury Slices block is a unique eat experience, with different flavours and textures. Now that's iconic in a new way.

Cadbury believe that tasting good and doing good should go hand in hand and sustainably sourced cocoa does good - for farmers, their communities, and our planet. Thanks to Cocoa Life, we are helping plantations to protect the forests around them and help farmers get the most from their cocoa trees through environmentally friendly farming.
  • Smooth & Creamy

  • Caramelised White Chocolate

  • Caramel Slice

  • Perfect for Sharing

  • Supporting Sustainably Sourced Cocoa

name: Dairy Milk Chocolate Block
description: CADBURY FAMILY BLOCK CHOCOLATE:DAIRY MILK:.:180 GRAM
long_description:
The classic taste of smooth & creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate. Unwrap the family sharing block and be greeted by the irresistible aroma of the classic Cadbury Dairy Milk milk Chocolate. With every bite, you'll experience the smooth & creamy goodness that has made Cadbury a beloved household name for generations.

Give a cheer & a half for your #1 supporter. We all have someone -whether it's Mum, Dad, a grandparent, a mate, a teacher, a coach who's always been in our corner. They're the unsung heroes who cheer us on through thick and thin, and now it's time to return the favour. Share a Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate block today! 

Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate is made with the equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g. Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate blocks are proudly made in Tasmania. 
Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa. Cadbury believes that tasting good and doing good should go hand in hand. The cocoa life program aims to improve the livelihoods of farming communities and the landscapes where cocoa grows.
  • Smooth & creamy milk chocolate

  • A 180g family sized chocolate block perfect for sharing between family and friends

  • Share your generous spirit with Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate blocks

  • Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate blocks are proudly made in Tasmania

  • Supporting sustainably sourced cocoa

Proudly made in Tasmania.

name: Feastables Milk Chocolate Crunch
description: MR. BEAST FEASTABLES MILK CHOCOLATE CRUNCH 60G
long_description:
Indulge in the new and improved MrBeast Feastables Milk Chocolate Crunch Bar, crafted with a reformulated recipe for a richer and more delectable flavour experience. Blended to perfection, this smoother and creamier chocolate candy will melt in your mouth with every bite. The new formula features simple, high-quality ingredients resulting in a deliciously satisfying chocolate snack. Share the joy with this shareable treat, perfect for satisfying cravings and relishing sweet moments.



Product Features:



- New bars, even better taste: Experience the sweet, rich and delectable flavour of the reformulated Feastables MrBeast Milk Chocolate Crunch Bar, crafted for ultimate satisfaction.

- Simple, High-Quality Ingredients: Made with simple yet high-quality ingredients, including crispy puffed rice, ensuring a delicious and wholesome chocolate snack.

- Crisp Rice Infusion: Infused with crisp rice, this chocolate bar offers a satisfying crunch with each bite, adding an extra dimension of texture to the indulgent experience.

- Smoother and Creamier Texture: Blended to make a smooth and creamy chocolate candy, this bar offers a luxurious texture that melts in your mouth with every bite.

- Shareable for All: Perfect for sharing with friends and family, this chocolate bar is a delightful treat for chocolate lovers of all ages.
ingredients: Milk Chocolate 90% (sugar, whole milk powder, cocoa butter, cocoa mass, emulsifier (soy lecithin), natural vanilla extract), Crisp Rice 10% (rice flour, sugar, salt).

name: Block Chocolate Hazelnut
description: WHITTAKER'S BLOCK CHOCOLATE HAZELNUT BLOCK 200G
long_description:
There's a reason it's a favourite. Whittaker's pack a generous serving of premium hazelnuts, freshly batch roasted for flavour and crunch, into their super smooth 33% cocoa Creamy Milk Chocolate. Refined five times for ultimate smoothness and certified by the Rainforest Alliance too.

- 33% Cocoa Creamy Milk Chocolate with Roasted Hazelnuts: Creamy, nutty, and indulgent.
- Rainforest Alliance Certified: Ethically sourced and sustainable.
- Palm Oil & GMO Free: Pure, natural quality.
- Made in New Zealand: A product of excellence.

Whittaker's Hazelnut block is the perfect pairing of rich, velvety milk chocolate and the satisfying crunch of freshly roasted hazelnuts.

Pure Quality
Free from palm oil and GMOs, Whittaker's Hazelnut is crafted with the finest ingredients for pure, natural quality. With Rainforest Alliance Certified cocoa, it's responsibly sourced indulgence. Proudly made in New Zealand, it's a classic combination done to perfection.

  • Rainforest Alliance Certified

  • Palm Oil Free

  • GMO Free

  • Made in New Zealand

There's something special about toasted coconut. Even more so when it is smothered in Whittaker's 33% Cocoa, 5 Roll Refined, smooth Creamy Milk chocolate, that's Rainforest Alliance Certified too.

  • 33% Cocoa Creamy Milk Chocolate: Crafted with the finest ingredients.

    Whittaker's Coconut Block is a classic block, the combination of  33% Cocoa Creamy Milk chocolate & toasted coconut, this bar offers a decadent tasting experience.

    Pure Quality
    Free from palm oil and GMOs, Whittaker's Coconut Block is pure, natural quality. The Cocoa Beans are Rainforest Alliance Certified, ensuring you enjoy an ethically sourced chocolate block. Made in New Zealand, it's a deliciously decadent chocolate experience you can feel good about.

  • Palm Oil Free

  • GMO Free

  • New Zealand Made

name: Dairy Milk Biscoff Chocolate Block
description: CADBURY DAIRY MILK BISCOFF CHOCOLATE BLOCK
long_description:
An iconic collab bringing together two global taste icons. Two favourites together as one in a block. It's your favourite classic Cadbury chocolate you know and love, united with a biscuit twist you'll adore. Enjoy the delicious blend of smooth & creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate with the unique, crunchy Lotus Biscoff caramelised biscuit.

Cadbury & Biscoff block is the perfect 'me time' delicious treat for a cosy night, powering through the afternoon or sharing with friends and family.

Don't miss out on this epic Cadbury & Biscoff block. Taste it now!

Proudly made in Tasmania.

The equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g of Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate. 

Cadbury is made with sustainably sourced cocoa. We partner with cocoa farmers to help them gain knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.

They're literally out of this world because M&M'S Chocolates were the first chocolates to rocket into space! They also make brilliant chocolate treats for lolly bags, Halloween chocolate bowls and Christmas stockings! Party at your place? It starts with FUN SIZE M&M'S Chocolates!

name: Choc Little Ones Share Pack 16 Pack
description: KINDER CHOC LITTLE ONES SHARE PACK 16PK 200G
long_description:
Discover the magic of Kinder Chocolate, the beloved little chocolate bar that's been bringing smiles to kids for years. Each individually wrapped 12.5g bar features a deliciously mild and milky filling, generously coated in our signature Kinder milk chocolate. This unique combination creates an irresistible taste experience that's both creamy and satisfying, a stand-out amongst other kids chocolates.

Kinder Chocolate is made with 33% milk ingredients without any artificial colours or preservatives, ensuring a pure and wholesome chocolate treat. It's perfect for little taste buds and tummies, offering a reassuring choice for parents who prioritise quality and simplicity in their kids' treats. So, whether you're looking for a delightful everyday chocolate, a convenient kids treat, or the perfect addition to a party bag, Kinder Chocolate is the answer. Grab a pack today and share those little moments that bring big smiles!

  • Made with 33% Milk Ingredients: We pack our delicious milk chocolate with a generous 33% milk, offering a milder, creamier taste that's specifically designed for children's palates and a source of dairy goodness.

  • No Artificial Colours or Preservatives: Parents can rest easy knowing Kinder Chocolate contains no artificial colours or preservatives, making it a wholesome and reassuring choice for your kids' treats.

  • Perfect for sharing at any occasions: From the excitement of trick or treating at Halloween to the joy of birthday parties - these chocolate bars are handy addition to any party bag. Pack these individually wrapped chocolates in lunchboxes for a delightful recess surprise, bring them on road trips to keep spirits high, share them at family gatherings, and always keep a bag handy for your lolly bowls - they're sure to be a crowd-pleaser!
ingredients: MILK CHOCOLATE 40% (SUGAR, WHOLE MILK POWDER, COCOA BUTTER, COCOA MASS, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOY), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), SUGAR, SKIM MILK POWDER, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*), ANHYDROUS MILKFAT (MILK), EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL MILK CONSTITUENTS: 33%. TOTAL COCOA CONSTITUENTS: 13%. MILK CHOCOLATE CONTAINS COCOA SOLIDS 32% MIN., MILK SOLIDS 22.5% MIN.

long_description:
Not too big. Not too small. These crowd pleasing, party loving MARS FUN SIZE chocolate bars in a share pack of 12 are perfect for rewarding and sharing. Each delicious individually wrapped MARS chocolate bar in this share pack captures the legendary taste of soft nougat, slathered in caramel and covered in thick milk chocolate. Stock your pantry with this party chocolate bag and you'll have enough MARS FUN SIZE chocolates to prepare for anything from Halloween trick or treat bowls to lolly bags to packed lunches to mess-free treats! These individually wrapped funsize MARS bars are perfect for sharing with others or treating yourself and others. MARS - For You Who Did That Thing You Did

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

  • Fun size milk chocolate pieces to enjoy as a treat.

name: Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny Pink
description: KINDER SURPRISE CHOCOLATE EASTER BUNNY PINK 75G
long_description:
Hop into Easter delight with the Kinder Surprise Milk Chocolate Easter Bunny in Pink.

This isn't just an Easter bunny; it's a magical experience, featuring a delectable milk chocolate shell with a creamy, milky white lining, and the thrill of a surprise toy hidden within. Imagine the excitement of discovering this charming bunny during an Easter egg hunt, a special find that promises both sweet indulgence and playful entertainment. An extra special find this Easter indeed! Looking for Easter gift ideas? Pair Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny with a new book or pyjamas, creating a memorable Easter gift for your loved ones.

  • Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny is a whimsical treat that combines the joy of discovery with the deliciousness of smooth milk chocolate.

  • Perfect for celebrating Easter as a gift for the little ones.

  • Delight your loved ones by including a Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny in your hunts this Easter.

  • Toys are subject to availability

name: Easter Gold Bunny Milk Chocolate
description: LINDT EASTER GOLD BUNNY MILK CHOCOLATE 50G
long_description:
Celebrate this Easter with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating, gifting or for Easter Hunts the GOLD BUNNY makes any occasion special. A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate hollow

  • The perfect gift for family and friends, ideal for decorating or for Easter hunts

  • Smooth milk chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

name: Rocher Bunny
description: FERRERO ROCHER BUNNY 70G
long_description:
Make your holiday celebrations truly unforgettable with the Ferrero Rocher Hollow Bunny. This charming and sophisticated character is a seasonal exclusive, crafted specifically to bring the Easter spirit to your home. Dressed in his iconic gold foil and finished with a red ribbon and bell, this bunny is more than just a treat-it's a symbol of elegance and joy that only appears once a year. While many Easter eggs and treats focus on chocolate alone, the Ferrero Rocher Bunny elevates the experience by incorporating the brand's legendary hazelnut expertise. Each bunny is expertly crafted from smooth, premium milk chocolate blended with crunchy, gently roasted hazelnut pieces. This creates a multi-sensorial experience, offering a satisfying snap and a rich, nutty texture in every delicious bite. It is the perfect size for sharing with loved ones or savoring as a personal holiday indulgence. Whether you are setting a beautiful brunch table or looking for the star of the show for your gift baskets, this unique character fits perfectly. The shimmering gold aesthetic complements any decor, making it a favorite for both children and adults who appreciate the finer things. Because this character is available only during the Easter season, it adds an element of exclusivity and excitement to your annual traditions.

  • Limited Edition Seasonal Character: This unique Easter bunny is a seasonal exclusive, making it a must-have collector's item and a special treat that builds anticipation for the holiday every year.

  • Premium Hazelnut & Chocolate Blend: Unlike standard hollow Easter eggs, our bunny features a sophisticated blend of rich milk chocolate and crunchy hazelnut pieces for a gourmet flavor profile.

  • The Perfect Easter Egg Hunt Grand Prize: With its eye-catching gold foil and premium feel, this bunny serves as the ultimate reward for any Easter egg hunt, delighting finders with a touch of luxury.

  • Elegant Table Decor & Gifting: The beautiful presentation makes it an ideal centerpiece for your holiday table or a stand-out addition to a gift hamper filled with assorted chocolates.

name: Easter Gold Bunny Milk Chocolate
description: LINDT EASTER GOLD BUNNY MILK CHOCOLATE 200G
long_description:
Celebrate this Easter with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating, gifting or for Easter Hunts the GOLD BUNNY makes any occasion special.A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate hollow

  • The perfect gift for family and friends, ideal for decorating or for Easter hunts

  • Smooth milk chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier.

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

name: Crunchie Chocolate Easter Bunny
description: CADBURY CRUNCHIE CHOCOLATE EASTER BUNNY 170G
long_description:
Get ready for a honeycomb-filled adventure this Easter with the Cadbury Crunchie Easter Bunny! Made with the velvety smooth and creamy goodness of Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate, this bunny is sure to bring a smile to your face with every bite. And as if that wasn't enough, the golden crunch of crunchie pieces takes the chocolate experience to new heights.

Think of every time you've had a Crunchie bar - but now in bunny form, and with a whole bunch of festive flair. It's the perfect treat to gift to someone who's always up for a little bit of fun, or as a sweet reward for yourself after a long day of Easter egg hunts and festivities.

So why settle for just any ordinary chocolate bunny when you can have one that's both delicious and playful? The Cadbury Crunchie Easter Bunny is the ultimate choice for a fun and festive Easter celebration.

name: Easter Flower Gold Bunny Milk Chocolate
description: LINDT EASTER FLOWER GOLD BUNNY MILK CHOCOLATE 100G
long_description:
Celebrate this Easter with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating, gifting or for Easter Hunts the GOLD BUNNY makes any occasion special. A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate hollow

  • The perfect gift for family and friends, ideal for decorating or for Easter hunts

  • Smooth milk chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

With its classic design and rich flavour, the Cadbury Dairy Milk Hollow Easter Egg is a perfect way to embrace the warm and joyful spirit of the Easter season.

This isn't just an Easter bunny; it's a magical experience, featuring a delectable milk chocolate shell with a creamy, milky white lining, and the thrill of a surprise toy hidden within. Imagine the excitement of discovering this charming bunny during an Easter egg hunt, a special find that promises both sweet indulgence and playful entertainment. An extra special find this Easter indeed! Looking for Easter gift ideas? Pair Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny with a new book or pyjamas, creating a memorable Easter gift for your loved ones.

  • Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny is a whimsical treat that combines the joy of discovery with the deliciousness of smooth milk chocolate.

  • Perfect for celebrating Easter as a gift for the little ones.

  • Delight your loved ones by including a Kinder Surprise Chocolate Easter Bunny in your hunts this Easter.

name: Easter Mini Gold Bunny Chocolate 5 Pack
description: LINDT EASTER MINI GOLD BUNNY CHOCOLATE 5PK 50G
long_description:
Make Easter unforgettable with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating or Easter hunts.A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate mini hollows

  • The perfect for decorating, sharing or token gifting.

  • Smooth milk chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

Introducing the Cadbury Marshmallow Egg Tray, a decadent delight that's sure to please any sweet tooth. Each tray comes with 6 soft and fluffy marshmallow eggs, each one lovingly covered in rich and creamy Cadbury milk chocolate. But what makes these marshmallows special is the gooey, melted centre that's just waiting to burst with flavour. They're like little clouds of happiness that dissolve in your mouth with every bite. And when combined with the creamy, smooth Cadbury milk chocolate, it's a match made in chocolate heaven. So, why not treat yourself this Easter to the ultimate indulgence? The Cadbury Marshmallow Egg Tray is perfect for sharing or enjoying on your own.

name: Easter Figurines 6 Pack
description: KINDER EASTER FIGURINES 6 PACK 90G
long_description:
A charming collection of six unique designs that bring the spirit of the Easter to life. Discover the adorable Easter chocolate bunny, the cheerful Easter chocolate chicks, the gentle Easter chocolate sheep, and the whimsical Easter chocolate turtle, each crafted with a delicious milk chocolate shell and a creamy, milky white lining. These figurines are more than just an Easter treat; they're miniature works of art, capturing the essence of Easter with their intricate details and delectable flavour.

Imagine the excitement of finding these enchanting figures during an Easter egg hunt, each one a treasure waiting to be discovered. The limited-edition nature of these hollow figures adds an extra layer of anticipation, making them a coveted prize for any Easter celebration. Perfect for basket stuffers, party favors, or simply as a special kids Easter chocolate, these Kinder creations are designed to bring joy and wonder to the festivities. Each figure is a testament to the quality and craftsmanship that Kinder is known for, ensuring a delightful Easter experience for everyone.

These figurines are more than just a sweet indulgence; they're a part of the Easter tradition, a delightful way to celebrate the joy and wonder of the season.

  • The combination of smooth milk chocolate and creamy lining creates a sensory experience that delights both young and old.

  • These Kinder Hollow Figures are a must-have for any Easter festivity, adding a touch of whimsy and sweetness to the celebration.

  • Whether gifted to loved ones or enjoyed as a personal treat, these charming figures are sure to make this Easter a memorable one.

  • Create your own Easter Decorations or hide them for an easter egg hunt!

name: Easter Gold Bunny Milk Chocolate
description: LINDT EASTER GOLD BUNNY MILK CHOCOLATE 100G
long_description:
Celebrate this Easter with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating, gifting or for Easter Hunts the GOLD BUNNY makes any occasion special.A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate hollow

  • The perfect gift for family and friends, ideal for decorating or for Easter hunts

  • Smooth milk chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments.

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

name: Clinkers Chocolate Easter Bunny Sharepack
description: CADBURY CLINKERS CHOCOLATE EASTER BUNNY SHAREPACK 180G
long_description:
The Cadbury Clinkers Bunny Multipack is a delicious and irresistible treat that is sure to satisfy your sweet tooth. This multipack features six individually wrapped bunnies, each made with smooth and creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate and filled with colourful Pascall Clinkers candy pieces.

So, you want to know about Clinkers? Well, imagine biting into a chocolate bunny and suddenly getting a surprise party in your mouth! These colourful candy pieces are like little sweet explosions that make every bite exciting and fun. With so many different flavours and colours, each one is like a treasure hunt for your taste buds.

So whether you're looking for a treat to share with your family and friends, or simply want to indulge in something delicious for yourself, the Cadbury Clinkers Bunny Multipack is the perfect choice.

name: Easter Gold Bunny Dark Chocolate
description: LINDT EASTER GOLD BUNNY DARK CHOCOLATE 200G
long_description:
Celebrate this Easter with the Lindt GOLD BUNNY. Ideal for decorating, gifting or for Easter Hunts the GOLD BUNNY makes any occasion special.A worldwide symbol of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY has been passionately created by the Lindt Swiss Maitres Chocolatiers for over 70 years. At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.
Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.
  • Lindt's iconic GOLD BUNNY chocolate hollow

  • The perfect gift for family and friends, ideal for decorating or for Easter hunts

  • Fine dark chocolate lovingly crafted by the Lindt Master Swiss Chocolatier

  • As a timeless chocolate icon of Easter, the Lindt GOLD BUNNY elevates celebrations to create unforgettable moments

  • Commitment to ultimate quality from bean to bar

name: Crispbread Sweet Potato
description: SPLIITS CRISPBREAD:SWEET POTATO:.:130 GRAM
long_description:
Enjoy the benefits of simple, plant-based food with Spliits. Made with the goodness of great-tasting veggies, Spliits makes a delicious, easy meal or snack that you'll love any way, any time. We use simple ingredients like 100% Australian rice, orange sweet potato and sun-ripened corn to make our crispbread taste so good.

Top it with feta, roasted mini roma tomatoes, basil and parsley leaves with a few dots of extra virgin olive oil, or anything you like for an easy and tasty meal.

Snap it and dip it in hommus with roasted sunflower seeds and paprika, or your favourite dip for a convenient snack anytime.
ingredients: Rice (80%), Corn (11%), Dried Sweet Potato (6%), Salt, Natural Colour (Beta-carotene), Raising agent (Baking Powder).

name: Cruskits Crispbread Rye
description: ARNOTTS CRUSKITS CRISPBREAD:RYE:125 GRAM
long_description:
Arnott's Cruskits Rye are a healthy choice for versatile lunches and snacks. Made with rye, these crispbreads are perfect for pairing with cheddar cheese, sour cream, or other toppings. Low in fat and high in fibre, load them up with fresh vegetables like tomato, cucumber, or avocado for a light and delicious meal. They're ideal for lunch boxes, snacking at home, or enjoying on-the-go. With only 39 calories per serve, they're a guilt-free addition to your snacking routine.
  • - Lightly puffed and toasted crispbreads

  • - Less than 40 Calories per serve

  • - 97% fat-free crispbread

  • - No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - Made from 100% Australian sourced Rye

name: Crispbread Multigrain
description: RYVITA CRISPBREAD:MULTIGRAIN:.:250 GRAM
long_description:
Mix it up with the tasty goodness of Ryvita Multigrain.

Our source of fibre crispbread is packed with rye, buckwheat and the nutty flavour of lightly toasted seeds.

Our multigrain crispbread contains a few simple ingredients: rye, toasted seeds, grains and a pinch of salt. It is then baked to perfection to produce a light rye flavour ready to be loaded with your favourite topping!

description: RITZ BREAKZ CRACKERS:CLASSIC:.:250 GRAM
long_description:
If you're looking for the perfect snack to eat on it's own, top your Charcuterie board or pair with your favourite cheese, dip, or entertaining with family & friends, and want a platter that will steal the show, Ritz is your perfect accompaniment. It's the biscuit that can do it all! Top your cheeseboard with crackers, dips, slices of your tastiest block & soft cheeses, and a pop of fresh with fruit and vegetables and you'll have everyone covered. If you are feeling fancy, you can also create the perfect finger food for your party with Ritz cracker appetisers. Or if you'd like, eat straight from the packet!
  • 8 Portion Packs

  • Oven-baked crackers

  • Perfect for on the go snacking

long_description:
Open up to positive eating. Arnott's Vita-Weat fibre crispbreads are a deliciously healthy way to lunch. Made from natural and plant-based ingredients, they are the perfect partner to your favourite healthy toppings and a guilt-free, convenient and natural way to get your wholesome wholegrain boost. Arnott's Vita-Weat is the perfect lunch - just layer on your favourite healthy toppings and taste the grainy goodness. 
 
 
A source of fibre for digestive wellbeing and vitamin B3 to help you unlock energy. 
Made from 100% wholegrains. 
5 Health Stars. 
Get 40% of your daily RDI wholegrains with four high-fibre crispbreads. 
Healthy, plant based.

The ideal addition to your cheese board for an evening of socialising, try pairing these with your favourite flatbread dipping sauce or basil parmesan dip for extra strong flavour. long_description:
Australian snacking doesn't get much more iconic than Arnott's Sao crackers. You can't host a party or pack a picnic without these delicious plain biscuits. They are the original Aussie cracker! Weekend socialising and entertaining just wouldn't be complete without these crisp and flaky biscuits. Loved by everyone, Arnott's Sao biscuits are the ultimate savoury crackers for sharing when you're out and about with others. Or for a yummy snack at home, top with butter and vegemite and do the infamous squeeze. Proudly made in Australia, Arnott's Sao crackers have the classic crispy, salty crunch that Arnott's crackers are known for. So if you're looking for a quick and delicious snack, you can't beat a Sao!

Entertain with Elegance, Any Occasion

Impress your friends with a dip cracker that effortlessly blends gourmet flavor with the versatility to complement any topping. Loaded with tasty garlic, thyme and crunchy seeds, Olina's Bakehouse Garlic & Thyme Artisan Crackers are the perfect accompaniment to your cheese board for any entertaining or social occasion.

Share in the delicious flavour combinations with Olina's Bakehouse Artisan Crackers for long lunches, BBQ's, birthday celebrations, festive entertaining, christmas, new years, easter, spring carnival or casual get togethers with family and friends.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of Olina's Bakehouse premium quality specialty Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Delicious Garlic & Thyme Crackers

  • Perfect for entertaining

  • Packed with Garlic & Thyme

  • Made in Australia

If you're looking for the perfect snack to eat on it's own, top your Charcuterie board or pair with your favourite cheese, dip, or entertaining with family & friends, and want a platter that will steal the show, Captain's Table is your perfect accompaniment. It's the biscuit that can do it all! name: Blood Orange Pistachio & Rosemary Bites
description: OB FINEST BLOOD ORANGE PISTACHIO & ROSEMARY BITES 120G
long_description:
At OB Finest, we believe in quality without compromise, offering entertainers a refined, sophisticated touch that will please any connoisseur. Our range helps you create memorable experiences marked with your signature flair. Our Aperitif Bites are masterfully crafted with the finest ingredients to elevate your entertaining experience through blends of flavours and crisp textures.

Packed with a delicious combination of blood orange, pistachio & rosemary, OB Finest Blood Orange, Pistachio & Rosemary Aperitif Bites are the perfect accompaniment for snacking or sharing at any entertaining or social occasion.

Curate your tablescape with OB Finest Blood Orange, Pistachio & Rosemary Aperitif Bites which are perfect paired with a blood orange & rosemary spritz.

Dinner Parties, Birthdays, Festive Entertaining, Christmas, New Years, Easter, Spring Carnival, Mother's Day, Father's Day... whatever the occasion, OB Finest Aperitif Bites are the perfect pairing for your pre-dinner Aperitif moment along with your antipasto or charcuterie board. 

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of OB Finest Artisan Biscuits all by themselves.

 
  • Delectable Blood Orange, Pistachio & Rosemary Cracker Bites

  • Packed with a Delicious Combination of Blood Orange, Pistachio & Rosemary

  • Perfectly Paired with a Blood Orange & Rosemary Spritz

  • Perfect for Snacking or Sharing at any Entertaining Occasion.

name: Salada Crispbread Sourdough

long_description:
Discover your favourite Salada biscuit with a Sourdough twist. This Australian made crispbread is made with real sourdough starter and without any artificial colours, flavours, or preservative. Arnott's Salada Sourdough biscuits deliver an authentic taste experience. Low in saturated fat and Monash Low FODMAP certified, these crispbreads are proudly made in Australia. Top them with fresh avocado, tomato, cucumber, hummus, or cheddar cheese for a stunning snack or light lunch. For a sweet treat, try mixing them with butter, brown sugar, and chocolate to create Christmas Crack—perfect for festive occasions! Arnott's Salada is the perfect companion for any occasion. With 2 stay-fresh packs, these crispbreads are ideal for snacking at home, in the office, or on-the-go.
  • - Oven-baked crispbreads for a satisfying crunch

  • - Low in saturated fat for a healthier choice

  • - Monash Certified Low FODMAP

  • - No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives

  • - Foil packed for freshness

All delivered in one moreish cracker chip and with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, these oven-baked cracker chips are truly something else. Made for indulging, the bold flavours of Arnott's Sourdough Crisps Cheddar & Roasted Garlic pair wonderfully with cheese and charcuterie. Share these cheddar cheese crisps with loved ones and friends on the weekend or reach for a packet in the afternoon.

  • - Savoury snack with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • - Aussie made and Aussie loved cracker chips

  • - Ideal for pairing with dips, cheese and crackers
